> This skill supports the "actions on a change" model:
> 
> - **Can be invoked anytime**: Before all artifacts are done (if tasks exist), after partial implementation, interleaved with other actions
> - **Allows artifact updates**: If implementation reveals design issues, suggest updating artifacts - not phase-locked, work fluidly

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> M2 tasks: 2.1 through 2.9. Let me read the relevant spec and design files to understand exactly what's needed, then implement.
> 
> Key M2 tasks:
> - 2.1: src/shared.ts — postMessage message types shared between extension and webview
> - 2.2: Webview provider — CSP, localResourceRoots (this was partially done in M1, needs enhancement)
> - 2.3: media/sidebar.tsx — Full React app with 3 tabs, state retention on tab switch
> - 2.4: src/config.ts — Configuration read/write layer
> - 2.5: Workbench page component
> - 2.6: Settings page component
> - 2.7: Tasks page component (basic)
> - 2.8: init→stateSync full state push, instant config save
> - 2.9: Verification
> 
> Let me read the sidebar-config spec and design to understand the requirements clearly. Actually I already read them in the previous session. Let me proceed with implementation.
> 
> Let me plan the implementation order:
> 1. First create src/shared.ts (shared types for postMessage)
> 2. Create src/config.ts (config layer)
> 3. Rewrite media/sidebar.tsx as full React app with 3 tabs
> 4. Create React components (Workbench, Tasks, Settings)
> 5. Update extension.ts to wire everything together
> 
> For the React components, I need to think about what Radix UI components to use:
> - Tabs for the 3 tabs
> - Select for dropdowns (model, resolution, aspect ratio)
> - Maybe a simple step input for concurrency and cols
> 
> Let me also think about the postMessage protocol:
> 
> From frontend to backend:
> - `init` — webview mounted, request full state
> - `configUpdate` { key, value } — single config field changed
> - `generate` — click generate button
> - `preview` — click preview button
> - `addLibrary` — add material library folder
> - `removeLibrary` { path } — remove material library
> - `insertImage` { imagePath } — right-click insert into MD
> 
> From backend to frontend:
> - `stateSync` { config, tasks, history, libraries, currentMd } — full state push
> - `taskUpdate` { tasks } — task state changed
> - `error` { message } — error notification
> 
> For M2, I'll focus on:
> - init/stateSync
> - configUpdate
> - generate/preview (basic wiring)
> - The rest (addLibrary, removeLibrary, insertImage) can be stubs for M4
> 
> Let me also think about the data types:
> 
> ```typescript
> // Config type
> interface ImageFlowConfig {
>   apiKey: string;  // always empty in stateSync, for UI binding only
>   baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' | 'https://grsaiapi.com';
>   model: string;
>   aspectRatio: string;
>   imageSize: string;
>   concurrency: number;
>   workbenchCols: number;
>   tasksCols: number;
>   modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
> }
> 
> // Task/Job types (for M2 basic display, full types in M3)
> interface TaskInfo {
>   folderName: string;
>   model: string;
>   status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
>   // ...
> }
> 
> // History image info
> interface ImageInfo {
>   path: string; // fs path
>   webviewUri: string; // asWebviewUri for display
>   folderName: string;
> }
> ```
> 
> Let me now plan the file structure:
> 
> ```
> src/
>   extension.ts  — updated with full Webview provider + message handling
>   shared.ts     — new: message types
>   config.ts     — new: config layer
>   parser.ts     — existing
>   api.ts        — existing
>   utils.ts      — existing
> 
> media/
>   sidebar.tsx   — rewrite: full React app
>   sidebar.css   — new: static styles
> ```
> 
> For the Radix UI integration, I need to use:
> - `@radix-ui/react-tabs` for the three tabs
> - Regular HTML select or Radix Select for dropdowns
> - Simple number inputs for step controls
>

> Now for config.ts:
> 
> ```typescript
> import * as vscode from 'vscode';
> import type { ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';
> 
> const DEFAULTS: Omit<ImageFlowConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
>   baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
>   model: 'nano-banana-2',
>   aspectRatio: '3:4',
>   imageSize: '1K',
>   concurrency: 1,
>   workbenchCols: 4,
>   tasksCols: 2,
>   modelInjections: {},
> };
> 
> export class ConfigManager {
>   constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}
> 
>   async getApiKey(): Promise<string | undefined> {
>     return this.context.secrets.get('apiKey');
>   }
> 
>   async setApiKey(key: string): Promise<void> {
>     await this.context.secrets.store('apiKey', key);
>   }
> 
>   async deleteApiKey(): Promise<void> {
>     await this.context.secrets.delete('apiKey');
>   }
> 
>   getConfig(): ImageFlowConfig {
>     const stored = this.context.globalState.get<Partial<ImageFlowConfig>>('config') || {};
>     return { ...DEFAULTS, ...stored, apiKey: '' };
>   }
> 
>   async updateConfig(patch: Partial<ImageFlowConfig>): Promise<ImageFlowConfig> {
>     const current = this.getConfig();
>     const merged = { ...current, ...patch };
>     // Don't store apiKey in globalState
>     const { apiKey, ...toStore } = merged;
>     await this.context.globalState.update('config', toStore);
>     return merged;
>   }
> 
>   getLibraries(): string[] {
>     return this.context.workspaceState.get<string[]>('libraries') || [];
>   }
> 
>   async setLibraries(libs: string[]): Promise<void> {
>     await this.context.workspaceState.update('libraries', libs);
>   }
> }
> ```

> 
> 先读 spec 和当前源文件确认上下文，然后安装 Radix 依赖。

#### 👀 Read `spec.md`

`15:25:48`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-openspec-260611231038/openspec/changes/m1-m8-milestones/specs/sidebar-config/spec.md</code></summary>

```markdown
## ADDED Requirements

### Requirement: Webview 侧栏框架
系统 SHALL 提供 React 19 + Radix UI 驱动的侧栏 Webview，包含三个标签页。

#### Scenario: 侧栏初始化
- **WHEN** 侧栏 Webview 挂载完成
- **THEN** 前端发送 `init` 消息，扩展回推全量状态（配置、进行中任务、历史、素材库、当前 MD）

#### Scenario: 三标签页切换
- **WHEN** 用户在侧栏切换到不同标签页（工作台/任务/设置）
- **THEN** 切换显示对应页面内容，各页内部状态（如展开/折叠）保留不丢失

#### Scenario: Webview CSP 安全策略
- **WHEN** Webview HTML 被创建
- **THEN** 必须带 Content-Security-Policy：脚本锁 nonce，图片限 `webview.cspSource`，样式允许 `unsafe-inline`（兼容 Radix 内联定位）和 `webview.cspSource`

#### Scenario: 本地图片访问
- **WHEN** 前端需要显示本地图片
- **THEN** 图片路径必须经 `asWebviewUri` 转换，`localResourceRoots` 包含扩展 media 目录、工作区目录与全部素材库目录

### Requirement: 配置系统
系统 SHALL 管理全部配置项，支持即时保存（无保存按钮）。

#### Scenario: API Key 加密存储
- **WHEN** 用户设置 API Key
- **THEN** 该值存入 VS Code `secrets`（加密存储），不进入 `globalState`

#### Scenario: 通用配置存储
- **WHEN** 用户修改非 apiKey 的配置项
- **THEN** 该值存入 `globalState`，写入时按字段 patch 合并，不影响其他字段

#### Scenario: 即时保存
- **WHEN** 用户在设置页或工作台修改任一配置项
- **THEN** 新值立即持久化，无需点击保存按钮

#### Scenario: 素材库列表存储
- **WHEN** 用户添加或移除素材库文件夹
- **THEN** 列表存入 `workspaceState`（按工作区隔离）

### Requirement: 工作台页
系统 SHALL 在工作台页提供生成控件和素材库区域。

#### Scenario: 工作台控件布局
- **WHEN** 用户查看工作台页底部停靠区
- **THEN** 显示一行四个控件：模型下拉、分辨率下拉、比例下拉、并发数步进器（范围 1~10）

#### Scenario: 生成行状态显示
- **WHEN** 用户查看工作台
- **THEN** 显示当前生效 MD 文件名（无则「未打开 Markdown 文件」）、「预览请求」按钮、「生成」按钮；提交期间生成按钮禁用并显示「生成中…」

#### Scenario: 状态行
- **WHEN** 用户查看工作台底部
- **THEN** 显示最近一次操作的状态/错误消息，错误以红色显示

### Requirement: 任务页
系统 SHALL 在任务页展示进行中任务与历史记录。

#### Scenario: 进行中卡片展示
- **WHEN** 存在进行中的生成任务
- **THEN** 展开显示：标题（文件夹名+模型+进度）、聚合进度条+百分比、已下载图片缩略图、进行提示与错误列表

#### Scenario: 历史卡片展示
- **WHEN** 存在历史任务
- **THEN** 默认收起，标题显示文件夹名和图片数量，展开显示缩略图

#### Scenario: 缩略图点击打开原图
- **WHEN** 用户点击缩略图
- **THEN** 用 VS Code 打开原始图片文件

### Requirement: 设置页
系统 SHALL 在设置页提供全量配置编辑界面。

#### Scenario: API Key 设置
- **WHEN** 用户查看设置页
- **THEN** 显示密码输入框（已填值以掩码显示）+「获取 API Key →」链接，链接通过系统浏览器打开 `https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys`

#### Scenario: 节点与显示设置
- **WHEN** 用户查看设置页
- **THEN** 显示节点下拉（国内/全球）、工作台每行张数步进器、任务栏每行张数步进器

#### Scenario: 模型注入提示词编辑
- **WHEN** 用户查看设置页
- **THEN** 显示模型下拉（独立选择，不影响工作台当前模型）+ 对应注入句多行文本框

### Requirement: 前后端通信协议
系统 SHALL 通过 postMessage 实现 Webview 与扩展主进程双向通信。

#### Scenario: 消息类型定义
- **WHEN** 前后端需要通信
- **THEN** 消息类型在 `src/shared.ts` 中统一定义，两端引用同一份类型，避免协议漂移

#### Scenario: 配置即时同步
- **WHEN** 用户修改任一配置项
- **THEN** 前端发送配置变更消息，扩展写入存储后回推最新值

```
</details>

> 5. User clicks generate → sends `generate` → extension handles everything
> 
> For M2, the generate flow in extension.ts should use ConfigManager instead of hardcoded defaults.

```typescript
// ==================== 配置类型 ====================

export interface ImageFlowConfig {
  apiKey: string; // 仅前端绑定用，stateSync 中始终为空串
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' | 'https://grsaiapi.com';
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number; // 1~10
  workbenchCols: number; // 1~8
  tasksCols: number; // 1~8
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const CONFIG_DEFAULTS: Omit<ImageFlowConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ==================== 任务类型（M2 初版，M3 起补充完整状态机） ====================

export interface JobInfo {
  id: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  progress: number;
  imagePaths: string[];
  error?: string;
}

export interface TaskInfo {
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  startTime: number;
  jobs: JobInfo[];
}

// ==================== 参考图/素材 ====================

export interface ImageRef {
  fsPath: string;
  webviewUri: string;
  filename: string;
}

export interface LibraryInfo {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  images: ImageRef[];
}

// ==================== 消息协议 ====================

/** 前端 → 后端 */
export type FrontendMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'addLibrary' }
  | { type: 'removeLibrary'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; fsPath: string };

/** 后端 → 前端 */
export type BackendMessage =
  | { type: 'stateSync'; config: ImageFlowConfig; tasks: TaskInfo[]; history: ImageRef[]; libraries: LibraryInfo[]; currentMd?: string }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskInfo[] }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; message: string };

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { CONFIG_DEFAULTS, type ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';

export class ConfigManager {
  constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  // ========== API Key（secrets 加密存储） ==========

  async getApiKey(): Promise<string | undefined> {
    return this.context.secrets.get('apiKey');
  }

  async setApiKey(key: string): Promise<void> {
    await this.context.secrets.store('apiKey', key);
  }

  // ========== 通用配置（globalState，patch 合并） ==========

  getConfig(): ImageFlowConfig {
    const stored = this.context.globalState.get<Partial<ImageFlowConfig>>('config') || {};
    return { ...CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...stored, apiKey: '' };
  }

  async updateConfig(patch: Partial<ImageFlowConfig>): Promise<ImageFlowConfig> {
    const current = this.getConfig();
    // apiKey 不进 globalState
    const { apiKey: _ak, ...currentWithoutKey } = current;
    const { apiKey: _pk, ...patchWithoutKey } = patch;
    const merged = { ...currentWithoutKey, ...patchWithoutKey };
    await this.context.globalState.update('config', merged);
    return { ...merged, apiKey: '' };
  }

  // ========== 素材库列表（workspaceState，按工作区隔离） ==========

  getLibraries(): string[] {
    return this.context.workspaceState.get<string[]>('libraries') || [];
  }

  async setLibraries(libs: string[]): Promise<void> {
    await this.context.workspaceState.update('libraries', libs);
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import Workbench from './Workbench';
import Tasks from './Tasks';
import Settings from './Settings';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, TaskInfo, ImageRef, LibraryInfo, FrontendMessage, BackendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

const vscode = acquireVsCodeApi<BackendMessage>();

export default function App() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ImageFlowConfig | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskInfo[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ImageRef[]>([]);
  const [libraries, setLibraries] = useState<LibraryInfo[]>([]);
  const [currentMd, setCurrentMd] = useState<string | undefined>();
  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState('');

  // 处理来自扩展的消息
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (ev: MessageEvent<BackendMessage>) => {
      const msg = ev.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'stateSync':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          setLibraries(msg.libraries);
          setCurrentMd(msg.currentMd);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusMessage(msg.message);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatusMessage(msg.message);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);

    // 挂载后请求初始状态
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' } satisfies FrontendMessage);

    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const post = useCallback((msg: FrontendMessage) => {
    vscode.postMessage(msg);
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return React.createElement('div', { className: 'loading' }, '加载中...');
  }

  return React.createElement(
    Tabs.Root,
    { value: activeTab, onValueChange: setActiveTab, className: 'app-container' },
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.List,
      { className: 'tab-list' },
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '工作台'),
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'tasks', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '任务'),
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'settings', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '设置'),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-content' },
      React.createElement(Workbench, { config, currentMd, statusMessage, post }),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'tasks', className: 'tab-content' },
      React.createElement(Tasks, { tasks, history, config, post }),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'settings', className: 'tab-content' },
      React.createElement(Settings, { config, post }),
    ),
  );
}

```

```typescript
import React, { useCallback } from 'react';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, FrontendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

interface WorkbenchProps {
  config: ImageFlowConfig;
  currentMd: string | undefined;
  statusMessage: string;
  post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void;
}

const MODELS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const IMAGE_SIZES = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const ASPECT_RATIOS = ['1:1', '3:4', '4:3', '16:9', '9:16'];

export default function Workbench({ config, currentMd, statusMessage, post }: WorkbenchProps) {
  const handleConfigUpdate = useCallback(
    (key: string, value: unknown) => {
      post({ type: 'configUpdate', key, value });
    },
    [post],
  );

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'workbench' },
    // 素材库区（M4 填充）
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'materials-area' },
      React.createElement('div', { className: 'section-header' }, '素材库'),
      React.createElement('div', { className: 'materials-placeholder' }, '素材库功能将在后续版本中实现'),
    ),
    // 底部停靠区
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'dock-area' },
      // 控件行
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'controls-row' },
        // 模型下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '模型',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.model,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('model', e.target.value),
            },
            MODELS.map((m) => React.createElement('option', { key: m, value: m }, m)),
          ),
        ),
        // 分辨率下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '分辨率',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.imageSize,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('imageSize', e.target.value),
            },
            IMAGE_SIZES.map((s) => React.createElement('option', { key: s, value: s }, s)),
          ),
        ),
        // 比例下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '比例',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.aspectRatio,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('aspectRatio', e.target.value),
            },
            ASPECT_RATIOS.map((r) => React.createElement('option', { key: r, value: r }, r)),
          ),
        ),
        // 并发数步进器
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '并发数',
          React.createElement('input', {
            type: 'number',
            className: 'control-number',
            min: 1,
            max: 10,
            value: config.concurrency,
            onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
              const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
              if (v >= 1 && v <= 10) handleConfigUpdate('concurrency', v);
            },
          }),
        ),
      ),
      // 生成行
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'generate-row' },
        React.createElement(
          'span',
          { className: 'current-md' },
          currentMd ? `📄 ${currentMd}` : '未打开 Markdown 文件',
        ),
        React.createElement(
          'button',
          {
            className: 'btn btn-secondary',
            onClick: () => post({ type: 'preview' }),
          },
          '预览请求',
        ),
        React.createElement(
          'button',
          {
            className: 'btn btn-primary',
            disabled: !currentMd,
            onClick: () => post({ type: 'generate' }),
          },
          currentMd ? '生成' : '未打开 Markdown 文件',
        ),
      ),
      // 状态行
      statusMessage &&
        React.createElement(
          'div',
          { className: `status-line ${statusMessage.startsWith('错误') || statusMessage.startsWith('生成出错') ? 'status-error' : ''}` },
          statusMessage,
        ),
    ),
  );
}
```

```typescript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import type { TaskInfo, ImageRef, ImageFlowConfig, FrontendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

interface TasksProps {
  tasks: TaskInfo[];
  history: ImageRef[];
  config: ImageFlowConfig;
  post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void;
}

/** 格式化已进行时长 */
function formatDuration(startTime: number): string {
  const elapsed = Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000));
  const h = Math.floor(elapsed / 3600);
  const m = Math.floor((elapsed % 3600) / 60);
  const s = elapsed % 60;
  if (h > 0) return `${h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
  return `${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

/** 计算聚合进度百分比 */
function calcProgress(jobs: TaskInfo['jobs']): number {
  if (jobs.length === 0) return 0;
  const share = 100 / jobs.length;
  let total = 0;
  for (const j of jobs) {
    if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') {
      total += share;
    } else {
      total += (share * j.progress) / 100;
    }
  }
  return Math.round(total);
}

function TaskCard({ task, post }: { task: TaskInfo; post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void }) {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(true);
  const [, setTick] = useState(0);

  // 每秒刷新时长显示
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => setTick((t) => t + 1), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, []);

  const doneCount = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
  const failCount = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length;
  const subCount = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'submitting').length;
  const runCount = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'running').length;
  const progress = calcProgress(task.jobs);

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'task-card' },
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'task-card-header', onClick: () => setExpanded(!expanded) },
      React.createElement('span', { className: 'task-card-title' }, `${task.folderName}（${task.model}）· 生成中 ${doneCount}/${task.jobs.length} · ${failCount > 0 ? `失败 ${failCount} · ` : ''}${formatDuration(task.startTime)}`),
      React.createElement('span', { className: 'task-card-toggle' }, expanded ? '▼' : '▶'),
    ),
    expanded &&
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'task-card-body' },
        // 进度条
        React.createElement(
          'div',
          { className: 'progress-bar' },
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'progress-fill', style: { width: `${progress}%` } }),
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'progress-text' }, `${progress}%`),
        ),
        // 状态提示
        subCount > 0 && React.createElement('div', { className: 'task-hint' }, `正在提交 ${subCount} 个请求…`),
        runCount > 0 && React.createElement('div', { className: 'task-hint' }, `还有 ${runCount} 张正在生成…`),
        // 错误列表
        task.jobs.filter((j) => j.error).map((j) =>
          React.createElement('div', { key: j.id, className: 'task-error' }, `Job ${j.id}: ${j.error}`),
        ),
        // 已下载缩略图
        task.jobs.filter((j) => j.imagePaths.length > 0).map((j) =>
          j.imagePaths.map((p, i) =>
            React.createElement('img', {
              key: `${j.id}-${i}`,
              className: 'task-thumb',
              src: p,
              onClick: () => post({ type: 'openImage', fsPath: p }),
            }),
          ),
        ),
      ),
  );
}

function HistoryCard({ images }: { images: ImageRef[] }) {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false);

  // 按文件夹分组
  const groups = new Map<string, ImageRef[]>();
  for (const img of images) {
    const parts = img.fsPath.replace(/\\/g, '/').split('/');
    const folderName = parts[parts.length - 2] || 'unknown';
    if (!groups.has(folderName)) groups.set(folderName, []);
    groups.get(folderName)!.push(img);
  }

  if (groups.size === 0) return null;

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'history-section' },
    Array.from(groups.entries()).reverse().map(([folderName, imgs]) =>
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { key: folderName, className: 'task-card history-card' },
        React.createElement(
          'div',
          { className: 'task-card-header', onClick: () => setExpanded(!expanded) },
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'task-card-title' }, `${folderName}（${imgs.length} 张）`),
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'task-card-toggle' }, expanded ? '▼' : '▶'),
        ),
        expanded &&
          React.createElement(
            'div',
            { className: 'task-card-body' },
            imgs.map((img, i) =>
              React.createElement('img', {
                key: i,
                className: 'task-thumb',
                src: img.webviewUri,
                onClick: () => post({ type: 'openImage', fsPath: img.fsPath }),
              }),
            ),
          ),
      ),
    ),
  );
}

export default function Tasks({ tasks, history, config, post }: TasksProps) {
  const cols = config.tasksCols;

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'tasks-page', style: { '--tasks-cols': cols } as React.CSSProperties },
    tasks.length === 0 && history.length === 0
      ? React.createElement('div', { className: 'empty-state' }, '暂无任务')
      : null,
    // 进行中任务（倒序，新在前）
    [...tasks].reverse().map((t) =>
      React.createElement(TaskCard, { key: t.folderName, task: t, post }),
    ),
    // 历史
    React.createElement(HistoryCard, { images: history }),
  );
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import React, { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, FrontendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

interface SettingsProps {
  config: ImageFlowConfig;
  post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void;
}

const MODELS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];

export default function Settings({ config, post }: SettingsProps) {
  const [apiKeyInput, setApiKeyInput] = useState(config.apiKey);
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);

  const handleConfigUpdate = useCallback(
    (key: string, value: unknown) => {
      post({ type: 'configUpdate', key, value });
    },
    [post],
  );

  const injectionText = config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || '';

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'settings-page' },
    // API Key
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, 'API Key'),
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'setting-row' },
        React.createElement('input', {
          type: 'password',
          className: 'setting-input',
          value: apiKeyInput,
          placeholder: 'sk-...',
          onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
            const v = e.target.value;
            setApiKeyInput(v);
            handleConfigUpdate('apiKey', v);
          },
        }),
        React.createElement(
          'a',
          {
            className: 'setting-link',
            href: '#',
            onClick: (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
              e.preventDefault();
              post({ type: 'openImage', fsPath: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' });
            },
          },
          '获取 API Key →',
        ),
      ),
    ),
    // 节点选择
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '节点'),
      React.createElement(
        'select',
        {
          className: 'setting-select',
          value: config.baseUrl,
          onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('baseUrl', e.target.value),
        },
        React.createElement('option', { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' }, '国内节点'),
        React.createElement('option', { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com' }, '全球节点'),
      ),
    ),
    // 工作台每行张数
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '工作台每行缩略图数'),
      React.createElement('input', {
        type: 'number',
        className: 'setting-number',
        min: 1,
        max: 8,
        value: config.workbenchCols,
        onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
          const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
          if (v >= 1 && v <= 8) handleConfigUpdate('workbenchCols', v);
        },
      }),
    ),
    // 任务栏每行张数
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '任务栏每行缩略图数'),
      React.createElement('input', {
        type: 'number',
        className: 'setting-number',
        min: 1,
        max: 8,
        value: config.tasksCols,
        onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
          const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
          if (v >= 1 && v <= 8) handleConfigUpdate('tasksCols', v);
        },
      }),
    ),
    // 模型注入提示词编辑
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '模型注入提示词'),
      React.createElement(
        'select',
        {
          className: 'setting-select',
          value: injectionModel,
          onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => setInjectionModel(e.target.value),
        },
        MODELS.map((m) => React.createElement('option', { key: m, value: m }, m)),
      ),
      React.createElement('textarea', {
        className: 'setting-textarea',
        rows: 4,
        value: injectionText,
        placeholder: '输入该模型的注入提示词…',
        onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
          const next = { ...config.modelInjections, [injectionModel]: e.target.value };
          handleConfigUpdate('modelInjections', next);
        },
      }),
    ),
  );
}
```

```css
/* ===== 基础 ===== */
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body { font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: var(--vscode-font-size); color: var(--vscode-foreground); background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background); padding: 0; }

/* ===== Tab 布局 ===== */
.app-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }
.tab-list { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); flex-shrink: 0; }
.tab-trigger { flex: 1; padding: 8px 0; border: none; background: none; color: var(--vscode-foreground); cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.tab-trigger[data-state="active"] { border-bottom-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); font-weight: 600; }
.tab-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px; }

/* ===== 通用控件 ===== */
.control-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.control-select, .control-number { width: 100%; padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }

/* ===== 工作台 ===== */
.workbench { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
.materials-area { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; }
.section-header { font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.materials-placeholder { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; padding: 16px 0; }
.dock-area { flex-shrink: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); padding-top: 8px; }
.controls-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.generate-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.current-md { flex: 1; font-size: 11px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.btn { padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-button-border); border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; }
.btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.btn-primary { background: var(--vscode-button-background); color: var(--vscode-button-foreground); }
.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground); }
.btn-secondary { background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground); color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); }
.btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground); }
.status-line { font-size: 11px; padding: 2px 0; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.status-error { color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); }

/* ===== 任务页 ===== */
.tasks-page { padding: 4px 0; }
.empty-state { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; padding: 16px 0; text-align: center; }
.task-card { border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
.task-card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 6px 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background); }
.task-card-header:hover { background: var(--vscode-list-hoverBackground); }
.task-card-title { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.task-card-toggle { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 8px; font-size: 10px; }
.task-card-body { padding: 6px 8px; }
.progress-bar { position: relative; height: 16px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--vscode-progressBar-background); transition: width 0.3s; }
.progress-text { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; }
.task-hint { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.task-error { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.task-thumb { width: calc((100% - 8px * (var(--tasks-cols, 2) - 1)) / var(--tasks-cols, 2)); height: auto; margin: 2px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); }
.task-thumb:hover { border-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); }

/* ===== 设置页 ===== */
.settings-page { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
.setting-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.setting-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.setting-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; }
.setting-input { flex: 1; padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }
.setting-select, .setting-number { padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }
.setting-textarea { padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; resize: vertical; font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); }
.setting-link { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground); white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; }
.setting-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.loading { padding: 16px; text-align: center; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { postGenerate } from './api';
import { validateImageExt } from './utils';

const DEFAULT_BASE_URL = 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn';
const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'nano-banana-2';
const DEFAULT_ASPECT_RATIO = '3:4';
const DEFAULT_IMAGE_SIZE = '1K';

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  constructor(private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [this.extensionUri],
    };
    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data:;">
  <title>Image Flow</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

/** 确保 apiKey 已配置，未配置则弹输入框引导用户填写 */
async function ensureApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string | undefined> {
  const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('apiKey');
  if (apiKey) return apiKey;

  const input = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
    title: 'Image Flow: 请设置 API Key',
    prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取地址: https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
    password: true,
    ignoreFocusOut: true,
    placeHolder: 'sk-...',
  });

  if (input) {
    await context.secrets.store('apiKey', input);
    return input;
  }
  return undefined;
}

/** 获取目标 MD 文件的 URI */
function getTargetMdUri(uri?: vscode.Uri): vscode.Uri | undefined {
  if (uri && uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
    return uri;
  }
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (editor && editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
    return editor.document.uri;
  }
  return undefined;
}

/** 在同级目录下创建不重复的任务文件夹 */
function createTaskFolder(mdUri: vscode.Uri): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts =
    String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
    String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

  const dir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const prefix = `task-${ts}`;

  // 找已有序号，递增
  let seq = 0;
  if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
    const existing = fs.readdirSync(dir).filter((f) => f.startsWith(prefix));
    for (const name of existing) {
      const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10); // +1 for '-'
      if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
    }
  }

  const folderName = `${prefix}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(dir, folderName);
  fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });
  return folderPath;
}

/** 下载单张图片到指定目录，返回保存的文件名 */
async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) {
      throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    }
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());

    // 从 URL 提取扩展名，校验回退
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);

    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

async function handleGenerateImage(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const mdUri = getTargetMdUri(uri);
  if (!mdUri) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键点击一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }

  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);
  if (!apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage('未配置 API Key，已取消生成');
    return;
  }

  try {
    // 1. 读取 Markdown
    const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
    const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

    // 2. 解析参考图
    const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);

    // 3. 创建任务文件夹
    const taskFolder = createTaskFolder(mdUri);

    // 4. 发送 API 请求（M1 用同步 replyType: json）
    const response = await postGenerate(DEFAULT_BASE_URL, apiKey, {
      model: DEFAULT_MODEL,
      prompt,
      images: images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
      aspectRatio: DEFAULT_ASPECT_RATIO,
      imageSize: DEFAULT_IMAGE_SIZE,
      replyType: 'json',
    });

    if (response.status === 'succeeded' && response.results && response.results.length > 0) {
      // 5. 下载图片
      const mdBasename = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
      for (let i = 0; i < response.results.length; i++) {
        await downloadImage(response.results[i].url, taskFolder, `${mdBasename}-${i + 1}`);
      }
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成：${response.results.length} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskFolder)}`);
    } else if (response.status === 'failed' || response.status === 'violation') {
      // 失败：删除空文件夹
      fs.rmdirSync(taskFolder, { recursive: true });
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${response.error || '未知错误'}`);
    } else {
      // running 等意外状态
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`生成状态异常：${response.status}`);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
  }
}

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // 侧栏 Webview
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // 命令：生成图片
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', (uri?: vscode.Uri) =>
      handleGenerateImage(context, uri),
    ),
  );

  // 命令：预览请求（M1 占位）
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
    }),
  );
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 扩展停用时不做额外清理，subscriptions 自动处理
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { postGenerate } from './api';
import { validateImageExt } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { FrontendMessage, BackendMessage, ImageFlowConfig, TaskInfo, ImageRef, LibraryInfo } from './shared';

// ==================== 工具函数 ====================

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

function getTargetMdUri(uri?: vscode.Uri): vscode.Uri | undefined {
  if (uri && uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) return uri;
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (editor && editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) return editor.document.uri;
  return undefined;
}

function createTaskFolder(mdUri: vscode.Uri): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts =
    String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
    String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

  const dir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const prefix = `task-${ts}`;
  let seq = 0;
  if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
    for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) {
      if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
        const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10);
        if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
      }
    }
  }
  const folderPath = path.join(dir, `${prefix}-${seq}`);
  fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });
  return folderPath;
}

async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);
    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

// ==================== Sidebar Webview Provider ====================

class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly configManager: ConfigManager,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this.view = webviewView;
    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        this.extensionUri,
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map((f) => f.uri) || []),
      ],
    };
    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);

    // 处理前端消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => {
      this.handleMessage(msg);
    });
  }

  private post(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this.view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async sendState() {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const currentMd = vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? path.basename(vscode.window.activeTextEditor.document.fileName)
      : undefined;

    this.post({
      type: 'stateSync',
      config,
      tasks: [],
      history: [],
      libraries: [],
      currentMd,
    });
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this.sendState();
        break;

      case 'configUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === 'apiKey') {
          const val = msg.value as string;
          if (val) {
            await this.configManager.setApiKey(val);
          }
          // 回推时 apiKey 保持空
          const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
          this.post({ type: 'stateSync', config, tasks: [], history: [], libraries: [], currentMd: undefined });
        } else {
          const patch: Record<string, unknown> = {};
          patch[msg.key] = msg.value;
          await this.configManager.updateConfig(patch);
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'generate': {
        const mdUri = getTargetMdUri();
        if (mdUri) {
          await handleGenerateImage(this.configManager, mdUri);
        } else {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
        break;

      case 'openImage': {
        if (msg.fsPath.startsWith('http')) {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.fsPath));
        } else {
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.fsPath));
        }
        break;
      }

      // M4 素材库占位
      case 'addLibrary':
      case 'removeLibrary':
      case 'insertImage':
        break;
    }
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data: https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>Image Flow</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

// ==================== 生成命令 ====================

async function handleGenerateImage(configManager: ConfigManager, mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const apiKey = await configManager.getApiKey();
  if (!apiKey) {
    const input = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
      title: 'Image Flow: 请设置 API Key',
      prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取地址: https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
      password: true,
      ignoreFocusOut: true,
      placeHolder: 'sk-...',
    });
    if (input) {
      await configManager.setApiKey(input);
    } else {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('未配置 API Key，已取消生成');
      return;
    }
  }

  const effectiveApiKey = apiKey || (await configManager.getApiKey());
  if (!effectiveApiKey) return;

  const config = await configManager.getConfig();

  try {
    const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
    const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

    const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);
    const taskFolder = createTaskFolder(mdUri);

    const response = await postGenerate(config.baseUrl, effectiveApiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt,
      images: images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'json',
    });

    if (response.status === 'succeeded' && response.results?.length) {
      const mdBasename = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
      for (let i = 0; i < response.results.length; i++) {
        await downloadImage(response.results[i].url, taskFolder, `${mdBasename}-${i + 1}`);
      }
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成：${response.results.length} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskFolder)}`);
    } else if (response.status === 'failed' || response.status === 'violation') {
      fs.rmdirSync(taskFolder, { recursive: true });
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${response.error || '未知错误'}`);
    } else {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`生成状态异常：${response.status}`);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
  }
}

// ==================== 扩展入口 ====================

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context);

  // 侧栏 Webview
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // 命令：生成图片
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = getTargetMdUri(uri);
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键点击一个 Markdown 文件');
        return;
      }
      await handleGenerateImage(configManager, mdUri);
    }),
  );

  // 命令：预览请求（M5 实现）
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
    }),
  );
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // subscriptions 自动清理
}

```
</details>

另外：上一轮你总结说三个标签页切换时能保留页内状态，但我实际试了一下，切走再切回来，页内的局部状态（比如展开/收起、输入到一半的内容）会丢失、整页回到初始样子。这与 spec §8 的要求不符，请自查为什么你的验证没发现这一点，并在本轮一并修复。`

> Implement tasks from an OpenSpec change.
> 
> **Input**: Optionally specify a change name (e.g., `/opsx:apply add-auth`). If omitted, check if it can be inferred from conversation context. If vague or ambiguous you MUST prompt for available changes.
> 
> **Steps**
> 
> 1. **Select the change**
> 
>    If a name is provided, use it. Otherwise:
>    - Infer from conversation context if the user mentioned a change
>    - Auto-select if only one active change exists
>    - If ambiguous, run `openspec list --json` to get available changes and use the **AskUserQuestion tool** to let the user select
> 
>    Always announce: "Using change: <name>" and how to override (e.g., `/opsx:apply <other>`).
> 
> 2. **Check status to understand the schema**
>    ```bash
>    openspec status --change "<name>" --json
>    ```
>    Parse the JSON to understand:
>    - `schemaName`: The workflow being used (e.g., "spec-driven")
>    - `planningHome`, `changeRoot`, and `actionContext`: planning scope and edit constraints
>    - Which artifact contains the tasks (typically "tasks" for spec-driven, check status for others)
> 
> 3. **Get apply instructions**
> 
>    ```bash
>    openspec instructions apply --change "<name>" --json
>    ```
> 
>    This returns:
>    - `contextFiles`: artifact ID -> array of concrete file paths (varies by schema)
>    - Progress (total, complete, remaining)
>    - Task list with status
>    - Dynamic instruction based on current state
> 
>    **Handle states:**
>    - If `state: "blocked"` (missing artifacts): show message, suggest using `/opsx:continue`
>    - If `state: "all_done"`: congratulate, suggest archive
>    - Otherwise: proceed to implementation
> 
>    **Workspace guard:** If status JSON reports `actionContext.mode: "workspace-planning"` and `allowedEditRoots` is empty, explain that full workspace apply is not supported in this slice. Treat linked repos and folders as read-only context, ask the user to select an affected area through an explicit implementation workflow, and STOP before editing files.
> 
> 4. **Read context files**
> 
>    Read every file path listed under `contextFiles` from the apply instructions output.
>    The files depend on the schema being used:
>    - **spec-driven**: proposal, specs, design, tasks
>    - Other schemas: follow the contextFiles from CLI output
> 
> 5. **Show current progress**
> 
>    Display:
>    - Schema being used
>    - Progress: "N/M tasks complete"
>    - Remaining tasks overview
>    - Dynamic instruction from CLI
> 
> 6. **Implement tasks (loop until done or blocked)**
> 
>    For each pending task:
>    - Show which task is being worked on
>    - Make the code changes required
>    - Keep changes minimal and focused
>    - Mark task complete in the tasks file: `- [ ]` → `- [x]`
>    - Continue to next task
> 
>    **Pause if:**
>    - Task is unclear → ask for clarification
>    - Implementation reveals a design issue → suggest updating artifacts
>    - Error or blocker encountered → report and wait for guidance
>    - User interrupts
> 
> 7. **On completion or pause, show status**
> 
>    Display:
>    - Tasks completed this session
>    - Overall progress: "N/M tasks complete"
>    - If all done: suggest archive
>    - If paused: explain why and wait for guidance
> 
> **Output During Implementation**
> 
> ```
> ## Implementing: <change-name> (schema: <schema-name>)
> 
> Working on task 3/7: <task description>
> [...implementation happening...]
> ✓ Task complete
> 
> Working on task 4/7: <task description>
> [...implementation happening...]
> ✓ Task complete
> ```
> 
> **Output On Completion**
> 
> ```
> ## Implementation Complete
> 
> **Change:** <change-name>
> **Schema:** <schema-name>
> **Progress:** 7/7 tasks complete ✓
> 
> ### Completed This Session
> - [x] Task 1
> - [x] Task 2
> ...
> 
> All tasks complete! You can archive this change with `/opsx:archive`.
> ```
> 
> **Output On Pause (Issue Encountered)**
> 
> ```
> ## Implementation Paused
> 
> **Change:** <change-name>
> **Schema:** <schema-name>
> **Progress:** 4/7 tasks complete
> 
> ### Issue Encountered
> <description of the issue>
> 
> **Options:**
> 1. <option 1>
> 2. <option 2>
> 3. Other approach
> 
> What would you like to do?
> ```
> 
> **Guardrails**
> - Keep going through tasks until done or blocked
> - Always read context files before starting (from the apply instructions output)
> - If task is ambiguous, pause and ask before implementing
> - If implementation reveals issues, pause and suggest artifact updates
> - Keep code changes minimal and scoped to each task
> - Update task checkbox immediately after completing each task
> - Pause on errors, blockers, or unclear requirements - don't guess
> - Use contextFiles from CLI output, don't assume specific file names
> 
> **Fluid Workflow Integration**
> 
> This skill supports the "actions on a change" model:
> 
> - **Can be invoked anytime**: Before all artifacts are done (if tasks exist), after partial implementation, interleaved with other actions
> - **Allows artifact updates**: If implementation reveals design issues, suggest updating artifacts - not phase-locked, work fluidly
> 
> 
> ARGUMENTS: 按计划实施 M3（异步任务机制）：改为 replyType:async 提交 + 单定时器后台轮询 + globalState 持久化 + 重启续拉；多任务并发互不干扰。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。
> 另外：上一轮你总结说三个标签页切换时能保留页内状态，但我实际试了一下，切走再切回来，页内的局部状态（比如展开/收起、输入到一半的内容）会丢失、整页回到初始样子。这与 spec §8 的要求不符，请自查为什么你的验证没发现这一点，并在本轮一并修复。

### 🤖 Assistant: *开始实施 M3。先获取上下文，然后分析两个问题：标签页状态丢失 bug + M3…*

`15:31:42`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> The user has two requests:
> 1. Implement M3 (async task mechanism)
> 2. Fix a bug where tab state is lost when switching tabs — the current implementation makes Radix Tabs re-mount components when switching, which destroys local state like expanded/collapsed cards and form inputs.
> 
> Let me first analyze the tab state bug. Looking at my App.tsx implementation:
> 
> ```tsx
> React.createElement(
>   Tabs.Content,
>   { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-content' },
>   React.createElement(Workbench, { config, currentMd, statusMessage, post }),
> ),
> ```
> 
> Radix Tabs by default unmounts inactive tab content (forceMount isn't set). So when you switch away from a tab and come back, the component remounts from scratch.
> 
> The fix: add `forceMount` prop to each `Tabs.Content` and use CSS `display: none` to hide inactive tabs. This keeps the React components mounted and preserves their internal state.
> 
> Now for M3, I need to implement:
> - 3.1: Task state machine (src/task-manager.ts)
> - 3.2: Async submission (replyType: 'async')
> - 3.3: Single timer polling engine with reentry lock
> - 3.4: GET /v1/api/result query
> - 3.5: Download logic
> - 3.6: globalState persistence
> - 3.7: Resume on activation
> - 3.8: Timeout + cleanup
> - 3.9: Verification
> 
> Let me start by reading the relevant spec and current code.
> 
> The key data structure changes:
> - `TaskInfo` needs to expand from M2's simple version to include real state machine
> - `JobInfo` needs the full state machine (submitting → running → succeeded/failed/violation)
> - Need a `TaskManager` class that manages polling, persistence, etc.
> 
> Let me plan the implementation:
> 
> 1. First, fix the tab state bug (App.tsx)
> 2. Create `src/task-manager.ts` - the core async task engine
> 3. Update `src/shared.ts` - expand types if needed
> 4. Update `src/api.ts` - add `getResult` function
> 5. Update `src/extension.ts` - integrate TaskManager
> 6. Update webview components to work with async tasks
> 7. Verify compile
> 
> Let me read the current files to understand the exact state before making changes.
</details>

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import Workbench from './Workbench';
import Tasks from './Tasks';
import Settings from './Settings';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, TaskInfo, ImageRef, LibraryInfo, FrontendMessage, BackendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

const vscode = acquireVsCodeApi<FrontendMessage>();

export default function App() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ImageFlowConfig | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskInfo[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ImageRef[]>([]);
  const [_libraries, setLibraries] = useState<LibraryInfo[]>([]);
  const [currentMd, setCurrentMd] = useState<string | undefined>();
  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState('');

  // 处理来自扩展的消息
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (ev: MessageEvent<BackendMessage>) => {
      const msg = ev.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'stateSync':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          setLibraries(msg.libraries);
          setCurrentMd(msg.currentMd);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusMessage(msg.message);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatusMessage(msg.message);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);

    // 挂载后请求初始状态
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' } satisfies FrontendMessage);

    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const post = useCallback((msg: FrontendMessage) => {
    vscode.postMessage(msg);
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return React.createElement('div', { className: 'loading' }, '加载中...');
  }

  return React.createElement(
    Tabs.Root,
    { value: activeTab, onValueChange: setActiveTab, className: 'app-container' },
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.List,
      { className: 'tab-list' },
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '工作台'),
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'tasks', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '任务'),
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'settings', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '设置'),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-content' },
      React.createElement(Workbench, { config, currentMd, statusMessage, post }),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'tasks', className: 'tab-content' },
      React.createElement(Tasks, { tasks, history, config, post }),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'settings', className: 'tab-content' },
      React.createElement(Settings, { config, post }),
    ),
  );
}

```

```typescript
// ==================== 配置类型 ====================

export interface ImageFlowConfig {
  apiKey: string; // 仅前端绑定用，stateSync 中始终为空串
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' | 'https://grsaiapi.com';
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number; // 1~10
  workbenchCols: number; // 1~8
  tasksCols: number; // 1~8
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const CONFIG_DEFAULTS: Omit<ImageFlowConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ==================== 任务类型（M2 初版，M3 起补充完整状态机） ====================

export interface JobInfo {
  id: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  progress: number;
  imagePaths: string[];
  error?: string;
}

export interface TaskInfo {
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  startTime: number;
  jobs: JobInfo[];
}

// ==================== 参考图/素材 ====================

export interface ImageRef {
  fsPath: string;
  webviewUri: string;
  filename: string;
}

export interface LibraryInfo {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  images: ImageRef[];
}

// ==================== 消息协议 ====================

/** 前端 → 后端 */
export type FrontendMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'addLibrary' }
  | { type: 'removeLibrary'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; fsPath: string };

/** 后端 → 前端 */
export type BackendMessage =
  | { type: 'stateSync'; config: ImageFlowConfig; tasks: TaskInfo[]; history: ImageRef[]; libraries: LibraryInfo[]; currentMd?: string }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskInfo[] }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; message: string };
```

```typescript
import { vipPixelValue } from './utils';

/** 模型类型 */
export type ModelType = 'nano-banana' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';

/** 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

/** API 返回结果 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 判断模型属于哪个系列 */
function modelSeries(model: string): ModelType {
  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) return 'nano-banana';
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') return 'gpt-image-2';
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') return 'gpt-image-2-vip';
  return 'nano-banana'; // 默认走 nano-banana 系列
}

/** 构造请求体，按模型系列区分尺寸字段 */
export function buildRequestBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const series = modelSeries(req.model);
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: req.replyType,
  };

  switch (series) {
    case 'nano-banana':
      body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
      body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2':
      body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2-vip':
      body.aspectRatio = vipPixelValue(req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
      break;
  }

  return body;
}

/** 校验 API 响应结构 */
export function validateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：不是 JSON 对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  if (typeof d.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：id 字段缺失或非字符串');
  }

  const status = d.status;
  if (typeof status !== 'string' || !['running', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'violation'].includes(status)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：status 字段值非法 (${status})`);
  }

  const result: GenerateResponse = {
    id: d.id,
    status: status as GenerateResponse['status'],
  };

  if (d.results !== undefined) {
    if (!Array.isArray(d.results)) {
      throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 非数组');
    }
    result.results = d.results.map((r: unknown) => {
      if (typeof r !== 'object' || r === null || typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 元素缺少 url');
      }
      return { url: (r as Record<string, string>).url };
    });
  }

  if (d.progress !== undefined) {
    if (typeof d.progress !== 'number') {
      throw new Error('响应格式异常：progress 非数字');
    }
    result.progress = d.progress;
  }

  if (d.error !== undefined) {
    if (typeof d.error !== 'string') {
      throw new Error('响应格式异常：error 非字符串');
    }
    result.error = d.error;
  }

  return result;
}

/** 发送生成请求 */
export async function postGenerate(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  req: GenerateRequest,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const body = buildRequestBody(req);
    const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    const data: unknown = await res.json();
    return validateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { postGenerate } from './api';
import { validateImageExt } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { FrontendMessage, BackendMessage } from './shared';

// ==================== 工具函数 ====================

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

function getTargetMdUri(uri?: vscode.Uri): vscode.Uri | undefined {
  if (uri && uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) return uri;
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (editor && editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) return editor.document.uri;
  return undefined;
}

function createTaskFolder(mdUri: vscode.Uri): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts =
    String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
    String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
    String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

  const dir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const prefix = `task-${ts}`;
  let seq = 0;
  if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
    for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) {
      if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
        const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10);
        if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
      }
    }
  }
  const folderPath = path.join(dir, `${prefix}-${seq}`);
  fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });
  return folderPath;
}

async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);
    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

// ==================== Sidebar Webview Provider ====================

class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly configManager: ConfigManager,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this.view = webviewView;
    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        this.extensionUri,
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map((f) => f.uri) || []),
      ],
    };
    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);

    // 处理前端消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => {
      this.handleMessage(msg);
    });
  }

  private post(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this.view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async sendState() {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const currentMd = vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? path.basename(vscode.window.activeTextEditor.document.fileName)
      : undefined;

    this.post({
      type: 'stateSync',
      config,
      tasks: [],
      history: [],
      libraries: [],
      currentMd,
    });
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this.sendState();
        break;

      case 'configUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === 'apiKey') {
          const val = msg.value as string;
          if (val) {
            await this.configManager.setApiKey(val);
          }
          // 回推时 apiKey 保持空
          const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
          this.post({ type: 'stateSync', config, tasks: [], history: [], libraries: [], currentMd: undefined });
        } else {
          const patch: Record<string, unknown> = {};
          patch[msg.key] = msg.value;
          await this.configManager.updateConfig(patch);
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'generate': {
        const mdUri = getTargetMdUri();
        if (mdUri) {
          await handleGenerateImage(this.configManager, mdUri);
        } else {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
        break;

      case 'openImage': {
        if (msg.fsPath.startsWith('http')) {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.fsPath));
        } else {
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.fsPath));
        }
        break;
      }

      // M4 素材库占位
      case 'addLibrary':
      case 'removeLibrary':
      case 'insertImage':
        break;
    }
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data: https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>Image Flow</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

// ==================== 生成命令 ====================

async function handleGenerateImage(configManager: ConfigManager, mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const apiKey = await configManager.getApiKey();
  if (!apiKey) {
    const input = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
      title: 'Image Flow: 请设置 API Key',
      prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取地址: https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
      password: true,
      ignoreFocusOut: true,
      placeHolder: 'sk-...',
    });
    if (input) {
      await configManager.setApiKey(input);
    } else {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('未配置 API Key，已取消生成');
      return;
    }
  }

  const effectiveApiKey = apiKey || (await configManager.getApiKey());
  if (!effectiveApiKey) return;

  const config = await configManager.getConfig();

  try {
    const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
    const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

    const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);
    const taskFolder = createTaskFolder(mdUri);

    const response = await postGenerate(config.baseUrl, effectiveApiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt,
      images: images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'json',
    });

    if (response.status === 'succeeded' && response.results?.length) {
      const mdBasename = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
      for (let i = 0; i < response.results.length; i++) {
        await downloadImage(response.results[i].url, taskFolder, `${mdBasename}-${i + 1}`);
      }
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成：${response.results.length} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskFolder)}`);
    } else if (response.status === 'failed' || response.status === 'violation') {
      fs.rmdirSync(taskFolder, { recursive: true });
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${response.error || '未知错误'}`);
    } else {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`生成状态异常：${response.status}`);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
  }
}

// ==================== 扩展入口 ====================

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context);

  // 侧栏 Webview
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // 命令：生成图片
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = getTargetMdUri(uri);
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键点击一个 Markdown 文件');
        return;
      }
      await handleGenerateImage(configManager, mdUri);
    }),
  );

  // 命令：预览请求（M5 实现）
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
    }),
  );
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // subscriptions 自动清理
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { CONFIG_DEFAULTS, type ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';

export class ConfigManager {
  constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  // ========== API Key（secrets 加密存储） ==========

  async getApiKey(): Promise<string | undefined> {
    return this.context.secrets.get('apiKey');
  }

  async setApiKey(key: string): Promise<void> {
    await this.context.secrets.store('apiKey', key);
  }

  // ========== 通用配置（globalState，patch 合并） ==========

  getConfig(): ImageFlowConfig {
    const stored = this.context.globalState.get<Partial<ImageFlowConfig>>('config') || {};
    return { ...CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...stored, apiKey: '' };
  }

  async updateConfig(patch: Partial<ImageFlowConfig>): Promise<ImageFlowConfig> {
    const current = this.getConfig();
    // 从 patch 中剥离 apiKey（不进 globalState）
    const { apiKey: _apiKey, ...patchWithoutKey } = patch;
    void _apiKey;
    const { apiKey: _currentApiKey, ...currentWithoutKey } = current;
    void _currentApiKey;
    const merged = { ...currentWithoutKey, ...patchWithoutKey };
    await this.context.globalState.update('config', merged);
    return { ...merged, apiKey: '' };
  }

  // ========== 素材库列表（workspaceState，按工作区隔离） ==========

  getLibraries(): string[] {
    return this.context.workspaceState.get<string[]>('libraries') || [];
  }

  async setLibraries(libs: string[]): Promise<void> {
    await this.context.workspaceState.update('libraries', libs);
  }
}

```
