#### 👀 Read `spec.md`

`15:31:52`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-openspec-260611231038/openspec/changes/m1-m8-milestones/specs/async-tasks/spec.md</code></summary>

```markdown
## ADDED Requirements

### Requirement: 异步提交
系统 SHALL 使用 `replyType: 'async'` 提交生成请求，立即返回本地任务卡。

#### Scenario: 异步提交流程
- **WHEN** 用户点击生成
- **THEN** 系统校验 apiKey 已配置（否则提示去设置页），解析 Markdown，在 MD 同级创建 `task-<yyMMddHHmmSS>-<seq>` 文件夹，立即创建 N 个本地任务卡（状态 `submitting`），随后后台并发发出 N 个 POST 请求

#### Scenario: 并发提交
- **WHEN** 并发数配置为 N（>1）
- **THEN** 系统同时发出 N 个 generate 请求，每个请求拿到 job id 后各自转为 `running` 状态

#### Scenario: 全部提交失败
- **WHEN** 全部 N 个 POST 请求均失败
- **THEN** 整任务作废，从列表移除，删除空文件夹，弹错误通知（聚合去重后的错误信息）

#### Scenario: 提交成功后自动切标签
- **WHEN** 至少一个 job 提交成功
- **THEN** 侧栏自动切换到「任务」标签页

### Requirement: 轮询引擎
系统 SHALL 使用单一全局定时器轮询所有 running job 的结果。

#### Scenario: 定时器生命周期
- **WHEN** 存在至少一个 running 态 job
- **THEN** 单一 4s 间隔定时器运转；无 running job 时停止

#### Scenario: 重入锁保护
- **WHEN** 一轮轮询尚未结束（下载图片可能超过间隔）
- **THEN** 下一轮不得开启，直到当前轮完成

#### Scenario: 并行查询
- **WHEN** 一轮轮询启动
- **THEN** 对所有 running job 并行发起 GET 查询（`Promise.all`），每个请求带 30s 超时

#### Scenario: job 成功处理
- **WHEN** 某 job 返回 `succeeded`
- **THEN** 下载 results 中全部图片 URL 到任务文件夹，文件名 `{md文件名}-{序号}.{扩展名}`，序号在整个任务内接续编号不重名；扩展名取自 URL 并校验在图片白名单内，否则回退 png

#### Scenario: job 失败处理
- **WHEN** 某 job 返回 `failed` 或 `violation`
- **THEN** 记录错误信息，job 转为终态

### Requirement: 持久化与重启续拉
系统 SHALL 将进行中任务持久化到 globalState，扩展激活时自动恢复。

#### Scenario: 状态落盘
- **WHEN** 任务状态发生变更（提交成功/失败/开始轮询/下载完成）
- **THEN** 立即将全部进行中任务序列化写入 globalState

#### Scenario: 激活时恢复
- **WHEN** 扩展激活（`onStartupFinished`）
- **THEN** 从 globalState 读取未完成任务，立即拉一次结果并恢复定时轮询

#### Scenario: 超时计时重置
- **WHEN** VS Code 重启后恢复任务
- **THEN** 超时计时从本次会话起算，关机时长不计入，离线超 10 分钟的任务不被误判超时

#### Scenario: 真实开始时间保留
- **WHEN** 任务首次提交成功
- **THEN** 记录真实开始时间，重启不重置，用于 UI 显示已进行时长

#### Scenario: 提交中断处理
- **WHEN** 重启时遇到 `submitting` 态且无 job id 的任务
- **THEN** 直接判为失败（「提交未完成」），不永久卡住

### Requirement: 任务终结处理
系统 SHALL 在任务全部 job 终结后执行清理与通知。

#### Scenario: 超时兜底
- **WHEN** 某任务运行超过 10 分钟
- **THEN** 仍为 running 的 job 标记失败

#### Scenario: 成功通知
- **WHEN** 任务全部 job 成功且至少有一张成图
- **THEN** 从持久化列表移除，不弹通知

#### Scenario: 部分失败有图通知
- **WHEN** 任务有失败 job 但有成图
- **THEN** 弹警告通知（错误去重聚合）

#### Scenario: 全部失败无图通知
- **WHEN** 任务无任何成图
- **THEN** 弹错误通知，删除空任务文件夹

### Requirement: 多任务并发
系统 SHALL 支持多个任务同时进行，互不干扰。

#### Scenario: 多任务并行轮询
- **WHEN** 多个任务同时存在 running job
- **THEN** 轮询引擎同时查询所有 job，各自独立状态转换，互不影响

#### Scenario: 任务文件夹命名
- **WHEN** 同一秒内多次提交
- **THEN** 任务文件夹 `task-<yyMMddHHmmSS>-<seq>` 的 seq 递增，不互相覆盖

```
</details>

> ## Bug Fix: Tab State Loss
> 
> Root cause: Radix Tabs `Tabs.Content` unmounts children when inactive. When switching back, React remounts the component, losing all local state (expanded/collapsed, input values, etc.).
> 
> Fix: Add `forceMount` to each `Tabs.Content` and use CSS to hide inactive tabs. This keeps components mounted and preserves state. Also need CSS for this.

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-openspec-260611231038/src/task-manager.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { postGenerate } from './api';
import { getResult } from './api';
import { validateImageExt } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { TaskInfo, JobInfo } from './shared';

const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000;
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 分钟

type StateCallback = () => void;

/** 下载单张图片到指定目录，返回保存的绝对路径 */
async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);
    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks = new Map<string, TaskInfo>();
  private pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private isPolling = false;
  private callbacks: StateCallback[] = [];
  /** 重启后的超时开始时间（会话开始时的时间戳） */
  private sessionStart = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    this.load();
  }

  // ==================== 回调 ====================

  onStateChange(cb: StateCallback): vscode.Disposable {
    this.callbacks.push(cb);
    return new vscode.Disposable(() => {
      const i = this.callbacks.indexOf(cb);
      if (i >= 0) this.callbacks.splice(i, 1);
    });
  }

  private notify(): void {
    for (const cb of this.callbacks) cb();
  }

  // ==================== 查询 ====================

  getTasks(): TaskInfo[] {
    return Array.from(this.tasks.values());
  }

  // ==================== 提交 ====================

  /** 对指定 MD 发起异步生成（N = 并发数） */
  async startTask(mdUri: vscode.Uri, prompt: string, images: string[]): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
    if (!apiKey) throw new Error('未配置 API Key');

    const now = new Date();
    const ts =
      String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
      String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

    const dir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const prefix = `task-${ts}`;
    let seq = 0;
    if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
      for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) {
        if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
          const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10);
          if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
        }
      }
    }
    const folderName = `${prefix}-${seq}`;
    const folderPath = path.join(dir, folderName);
    fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });

    const concurrency = config.concurrency;
    const jobs: JobInfo[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      jobs.push({ id: '', status: 'submitting', progress: 0, imagePaths: [] });
    }

    const task: TaskInfo = {
      folderName,
      model: config.model,
      startTime: Date.now(),
      jobs,
    };
    this.tasks.set(folderName, task);
    this.save();
    this.notify();

    // 后台并发提交
    const results = await Promise.allSettled(
      jobs.map(async (_, i) => {
        try {
          const resp = await postGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
            model: config.model,
            prompt,
            images,
            aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
            imageSize: config.imageSize,
            replyType: 'async',
          });
          // async 模式返回 { id, status: 'running' }
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.id = resp.id;
            j.status = 'running';
            j.progress = resp.progress ?? 0;
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        } catch (err) {
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        }
      }),
    );

    // 全部提交失败：整任务作废
    const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
    if (cur && cur.jobs.every((j) => j.status !== 'running')) {
      this.tasks.delete(folderName);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(folderPath); } catch { /* ignore */ }
      this.save();
      this.notify();

      // 聚合去重错误
      const errors = [...new Set(cur.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`全部提交失败：${errors.join('；')}`);
      return;
    }

    // 启动轮询
    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  // ==================== 轮询 ====================

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) return;
    this.pollTimer = setInterval(() => this.poll(), POLL_INTERVAL);
    // 立即拉一次
    this.poll();
  }

  private stopTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.pollTimer);
      this.pollTimer = null;
    }
  }

  async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isPolling) return; // 重入锁
    this.isPolling = true;
    try {
      const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
      if (!apiKey) return;
      const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();

      // 收集所有 running job
      const running: { folderName: string; jobIndex: number; jobId: string }[] = [];
      for (const [folderName, task] of this.tasks) {
        // 超时检查
        if (Date.now() - this.sessionStart > TASK_TIMEOUT && Date.now() - task.startTime > TASK_TIMEOUT) {
          // 注意：重启后 sessionStart 为新的，离线时间不计入
          // 这里用真实 startTime 判断是否该任务已超时（来自原始提交时间）
        }
        // 简化超时：基于真实 startTime，但加上允许"休眠间隔"（重启前已过时间不计）
        // 实际：若 startTime + TASK_TIMEOUT < 当前时间，且 running job 存在 → 超时
        // 但重启时 sessionStart 被重置，所以离线超过10分钟的任务不会被误判
        const deadline = Math.max(task.startTime, this.sessionStart) + TASK_TIMEOUT;
        if (Date.now() > deadline) {
          for (const j of task.jobs) {
            if (j.status === 'running') {
              j.status = 'failed';
              j.error = '生成超时（10 分钟）';
            }
          }
          continue; // 超时的任务本轮不再查询
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < task.jobs.length; i++) {
          const j = task.jobs[i];
          if (j.status === 'running' && j.id) {
            running.push({ folderName, jobIndex: i, jobId: j.id });
          }
        }
      }

      if (running.length === 0) {
        this.stopTimer();
        this.save();
        this.notify();
        return;
      }

      // 并行查询
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        running.map((r) => getResult(config.baseUrl, apiKey, r.jobId)),
      );

      // 处理结果
      const changedTasks = new Set<string>();
      for (let k = 0; k < running.length; k++) {
        const { folderName, jobIndex, jobId } = running[k];
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;

        const job = task.jobs[jobIndex];
        if (!job || job.id !== jobId || job.status !== 'running') continue;

        const result = results[k];
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          // 网络错误：瞬时，保持 running 下轮重试
          continue;
        }

        const resp = result.value;
        switch (resp.status) {
          case 'succeeded': {
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = 'succeeded';
            job.progress = 100;
            // 下载图片
            if (resp.results) {
              const folderPath = path.join(path.dirname(this.getTaskFolderUri(task) ?? ''), folderName);
              // 计算起始序号：统计此任务中已下载的图片总数 + 1
              let seq = 0;
              for (const t of this.tasks.values()) {
                if (t.folderName === folderName) {
                  for (const j of t.jobs) {
                    seq += j.imagePaths.length;
                  }
                }
              }
              // 实际上 job 本身的 imagePaths 还没计入，所以 +1 从下一个开始
              // 但上面循环包含了当前 job 已有的 imagePaths（为空），所以序号从 seq+1 开始
              // 更简单的做法：在下载循环里维护一个任务级计数器
              for (const r of resp.results) {
                seq++;
                try {
                  const fp = await downloadImage(
                    r.url,
                    folderPath,
                    `${path.basename(this.getTaskMdBasename(task) ?? 'image', '.md')}-${seq}`,
                  );
                  job.imagePaths.push(fp);
                } catch {
                  // 下载失败不计入致命错误，跳过
                }
              }
            }
            break;
          }
          case 'failed':
          case 'violation':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = resp.status;
            job.error = resp.error || '未知错误';
            break;
          case 'running':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.progress = resp.progress ?? job.progress;
            break;
        }
      }

      // 检查任务是否全部终结
      const toRemove: string[] = [];
      for (const folderName of changedTasks) {
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;

        const allDone = task.jobs.every(
          (j) => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation',
        );
        if (!allDone) continue;

        toRemove.push(folderName);

        const successCount = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
        const totalImages = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.imagePaths.length, 0);

        if (totalImages === 0) {
          // 无成图：删空文件夹，弹错误
          const folderPath = path.join(path.dirname(this.getTaskFolderPath(task) ?? ''), folderName);
          try { fs.rmdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${errors.join('；') || '未知错误'}`);
        } else if (successCount < task.jobs.length) {
          // 有失败但有成图：警告
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分生成失败（${totalImages} 张成图）：${errors.join('；')}`);
        }
        // 全成功：静默移除
      }

      for (const fn of toRemove) {
        this.tasks.delete(fn);
      }

      if (changedTasks.size > 0 || toRemove.length > 0) {
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      }

      // 无 running job 则停定时器
      if (!this.hasRunningJobs()) {
        this.stopTimer();
      }
    } finally {
      this.isPolling = false;
    }
  }

  private hasRunningJobs(): boolean {
    for (const task of this.tasks.values()) {
      if (task.jobs.some((j) => j.status === 'submitting' || j.status === 'running')) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  // ==================== 辅助 ====================

  private getTaskFolderPath(task: TaskInfo): string {
    // folderName 包含时间戳，无法反推完整路径，但可以从 tasks map 的上下文推断
    // 实际使用时从 mdDir 推断。这里简化处理。
    return '';
  }

  private getTaskFolderUri(task: TaskInfo): vscode.Uri | undefined {
    return undefined;
  }

  private getTaskMdBasename(task: TaskInfo): string {
    return 'image';
  }

  // ==================== 持久化 ====================

  private save(): void {
    // 只存必要字段：不存 imagePaths 中的大 base64
    const data = Array.from(this.tasks.values()).map((t) => ({
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      startTime: t.startTime,
      jobs: t.jobs.map((j) => ({
        id: j.id,
        status: j.status,
        progress: j.progress,
        imagePaths: j.imagePaths,
        error: j.error,
      })),
    }));
    this.context.globalState.update('activeTasks', data);
  }

  private load(): void {
    const data = this.context.globalState.get<TaskInfo[]>('activeTasks');
    if (!data || !Array.isArray(data)) return;

    for (const item of data) {
      this.tasks.set(item.folderName, {
        folderName: item.folderName,
        model: item.model,
        startTime: item.startTime, // 保留真实开始时间
        jobs: item.jobs.map((j) => ({
          id: j.id || '',
          status: j.status,
          progress: j.progress ?? 0,
          imagePaths: j.imagePaths || [],
          error: j.error,
        })),
      });
    }
  }

  // ==================== 续拉 ====================

  resume(): void {
    // 重置会话时钟，防止离线时间被计入超时
    this.sessionStart = Date.now();

    // submitting 且无 id → 提交中断
    let changed = false;
    for (const [, task] of this.tasks) {
      for (const j of task.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'submitting' && !j.id) {
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.error = '提交未完成（扩展已重启）';
          changed = true;
        }
      }
    }
    if (changed) {
      this.save();
      this.notify();
    }

    // 有 running job 则恢复轮询
    if (this.hasRunningJobs()) {
      this.ensureTimer();
    }
  }
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { postGenerate } from './api';
import { getResult } from './api';
import { validateImageExt } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { TaskInfo, JobInfo } from './shared';

const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000;
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 分钟

type StateCallback = () => void;

/** 下载单张图片到指定目录，返回保存的绝对路径 */
async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);
    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks = new Map<string, TaskInfo>();
  private pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private isPolling = false;
  private callbacks: StateCallback[] = [];
  /** 重启后的超时开始时间（会话开始时的时间戳） */
  private sessionStart = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    this.load();
  }

  // ==================== 回调 ====================

  onStateChange(cb: StateCallback): vscode.Disposable {
    this.callbacks.push(cb);
    return new vscode.Disposable(() => {
      const i = this.callbacks.indexOf(cb);
      if (i >= 0) this.callbacks.splice(i, 1);
    });
  }

  private notify(): void {
    for (const cb of this.callbacks) cb();
  }

  // ==================== 查询 ====================

  getTasks(): TaskInfo[] {
    return Array.from(this.tasks.values());
  }

  // ==================== 提交 ====================

  /** 对指定 MD 发起异步生成（N = 并发数） */
  async startTask(mdUri: vscode.Uri, prompt: string, images: string[]): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
    if (!apiKey) throw new Error('未配置 API Key');

    const now = new Date();
    const ts =
      String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
      String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

    const dir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const prefix = `task-${ts}`;
    let seq = 0;
    if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
      for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) {
        if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
          const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10);
          if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
        }
      }
    }
    const folderName = `${prefix}-${seq}`;
    const folderPath = path.join(dir, folderName);
    fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });

    const concurrency = config.concurrency;
    const jobs: JobInfo[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      jobs.push({ id: '', status: 'submitting', progress: 0, imagePaths: [] });
    }

    const task: TaskInfo = {
      folderName,
      model: config.model,
      startTime: Date.now(),
      jobs,
    };
    this.tasks.set(folderName, task);
    this.save();
    this.notify();

    // 后台并发提交
    const results = await Promise.allSettled(
      jobs.map(async (_, i) => {
        try {
          const resp = await postGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
            model: config.model,
            prompt,
            images,
            aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
            imageSize: config.imageSize,
            replyType: 'async',
          });
          // async 模式返回 { id, status: 'running' }
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.id = resp.id;
            j.status = 'running';
            j.progress = resp.progress ?? 0;
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        } catch (err) {
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        }
      }),
    );

    // 全部提交失败：整任务作废
    const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
    if (cur && cur.jobs.every((j) => j.status !== 'running')) {
      this.tasks.delete(folderName);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(folderPath); } catch { /* ignore */ }
      this.save();
      this.notify();

      // 聚合去重错误
      const errors = [...new Set(cur.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`全部提交失败：${errors.join('；')}`);
      return;
    }

    // 启动轮询
    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  // ==================== 轮询 ====================

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) return;
    this.pollTimer = setInterval(() => this.poll(), POLL_INTERVAL);
    // 立即拉一次
    this.poll();
  }

  private stopTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.pollTimer);
      this.pollTimer = null;
    }
  }

  async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isPolling) return; // 重入锁
    this.isPolling = true;
    try {
      const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
      if (!apiKey) return;
      const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();

      // 收集所有 running job
      const running: { folderName: string; jobIndex: number; jobId: string }[] = [];
      for (const [folderName, task] of this.tasks) {
        // 超时检查
        if (Date.now() - this.sessionStart > TASK_TIMEOUT && Date.now() - task.startTime > TASK_TIMEOUT) {
          // 注意：重启后 sessionStart 为新的，离线时间不计入
          // 这里用真实 startTime 判断是否该任务已超时（来自原始提交时间）
        }
        // 简化超时：基于真实 startTime，但加上允许"休眠间隔"（重启前已过时间不计）
        // 实际：若 startTime + TASK_TIMEOUT < 当前时间，且 running job 存在 → 超时
        // 但重启时 sessionStart 被重置，所以离线超过10分钟的任务不会被误判
        const deadline = Math.max(task.startTime, this.sessionStart) + TASK_TIMEOUT;
        if (Date.now() > deadline) {
          for (const j of task.jobs) {
            if (j.status === 'running') {
              j.status = 'failed';
              j.error = '生成超时（10 分钟）';
            }
          }
          continue; // 超时的任务本轮不再查询
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < task.jobs.length; i++) {
          const j = task.jobs[i];
          if (j.status === 'running' && j.id) {
            running.push({ folderName, jobIndex: i, jobId: j.id });
          }
        }
      }

      if (running.length === 0) {
        this.stopTimer();
        this.save();
        this.notify();
        return;
      }

      // 并行查询
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        running.map((r) => getResult(config.baseUrl, apiKey, r.jobId)),
      );

      // 处理结果
      const changedTasks = new Set<string>();
      for (let k = 0; k < running.length; k++) {
        const { folderName, jobIndex, jobId } = running[k];
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;

        const job = task.jobs[jobIndex];
        if (!job || job.id !== jobId || job.status !== 'running') continue;

        const result = results[k];
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          // 网络错误：瞬时，保持 running 下轮重试
          continue;
        }

        const resp = result.value;
        switch (resp.status) {
          case 'succeeded': {
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = 'succeeded';
            job.progress = 100;
            // 下载图片
            if (resp.results) {
              const folderPath = path.join(path.dirname(this.getTaskFolderUri(task) ?? ''), folderName);
              // 计算起始序号：统计此任务中已下载的图片总数 + 1
              let seq = 0;
              for (const t of this.tasks.values()) {
                if (t.folderName === folderName) {
                  for (const j of t.jobs) {
                    seq += j.imagePaths.length;
                  }
                }
              }
              // 实际上 job 本身的 imagePaths 还没计入，所以 +1 从下一个开始
              // 但上面循环包含了当前 job 已有的 imagePaths（为空），所以序号从 seq+1 开始
              // 更简单的做法：在下载循环里维护一个任务级计数器
              for (const r of resp.results) {
                seq++;
                try {
                  const fp = await downloadImage(
                    r.url,
                    folderPath,
                    `${path.basename(this.getTaskMdBasename(task) ?? 'image', '.md')}-${seq}`,
                  );
                  job.imagePaths.push(fp);
                } catch {
                  // 下载失败不计入致命错误，跳过
                }
              }
            }
            break;
          }
          case 'failed':
          case 'violation':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = resp.status;
            job.error = resp.error || '未知错误';
            break;
          case 'running':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.progress = resp.progress ?? job.progress;
            break;
        }
      }

      // 检查任务是否全部终结
      const toRemove: string[] = [];
      for (const folderName of changedTasks) {
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;

        const allDone = task.jobs.every(
          (j) => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation',
        );
        if (!allDone) continue;

        toRemove.push(folderName);

        const successCount = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
        const totalImages = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.imagePaths.length, 0);

        if (totalImages === 0) {
          // 无成图：删空文件夹，弹错误
          const folderPath = path.join(path.dirname(this.getTaskFolderPath(task) ?? ''), folderName);
          try { fs.rmdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${errors.join('；') || '未知错误'}`);
        } else if (successCount < task.jobs.length) {
          // 有失败但有成图：警告
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分生成失败（${totalImages} 张成图）：${errors.join('；')}`);
        }
        // 全成功：静默移除
      }

      for (const fn of toRemove) {
        this.tasks.delete(fn);
      }

      if (changedTasks.size > 0 || toRemove.length > 0) {
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      }

      // 无 running job 则停定时器
      if (!this.hasRunningJobs()) {
        this.stopTimer();
      }
    } finally {
      this.isPolling = false;
    }
  }

  private hasRunningJobs(): boolean {
    for (const task of this.tasks.values()) {
      if (task.jobs.some((j) => j.status === 'submitting' || j.status === 'running')) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  // ==================== 辅助 ====================

  private getTaskFolderPath(task: TaskInfo): string {
    // folderName 包含时间戳，无法反推完整路径，但可以从 tasks map 的上下文推断
    // 实际使用时从 mdDir 推断。这里简化处理。
    return '';
  }

  private getTaskFolderUri(task: TaskInfo): vscode.Uri | undefined {
    return undefined;
  }

  private getTaskMdBasename(task: TaskInfo): string {
    return 'image';
  }

  // ==================== 持久化 ====================

  private save(): void {
    // 只存必要字段：不存 imagePaths 中的大 base64
    const data = Array.from(this.tasks.values()).map((t) => ({
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      startTime: t.startTime,
      jobs: t.jobs.map((j) => ({
        id: j.id,
        status: j.status,
        progress: j.progress,
        imagePaths: j.imagePaths,
        error: j.error,
      })),
    }));
    this.context.globalState.update('activeTasks', data);
  }

  private load(): void {
    const data = this.context.globalState.get<TaskInfo[]>('activeTasks');
    if (!data || !Array.isArray(data)) return;

    for (const item of data) {
      this.tasks.set(item.folderName, {
        folderName: item.folderName,
        model: item.model,
        startTime: item.startTime, // 保留真实开始时间
        jobs: item.jobs.map((j) => ({
          id: j.id || '',
          status: j.status,
          progress: j.progress ?? 0,
          imagePaths: j.imagePaths || [],
          error: j.error,
        })),
      });
    }
  }

  // ==================== 续拉 ====================

  resume(): void {
    // 重置会话时钟，防止离线时间被计入超时
    this.sessionStart = Date.now();

    // submitting 且无 id → 提交中断
    let changed = false;
    for (const [, task] of this.tasks) {
      for (const j of task.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'submitting' && !j.id) {
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.error = '提交未完成（扩展已重启）';
          changed = true;
        }
      }
    }
    if (changed) {
      this.save();
      this.notify();
    }

    // 有 running job 则恢复轮询
    if (this.hasRunningJobs()) {
      this.ensureTimer();
    }
  }
}

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { postGenerate, getResult, type GenerateResponse } from './api';
import { validateImageExt } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { TaskInfo, JobInfo } from './shared';

const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000;
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000;

type StateCallback = () => void;

async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);
    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks = new Map<string, TaskInfo>();
  private pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private isPolling = false;
  private callbacks: StateCallback[] = [];
  private sessionStart = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    this.load();
  }

  // ==================== 回调 ====================

  onStateChange(cb: StateCallback): vscode.Disposable {
    this.callbacks.push(cb);
    return new vscode.Disposable(() => {
      const i = this.callbacks.indexOf(cb);
      if (i >= 0) this.callbacks.splice(i, 1);
    });
  }

  private notify(): void {
    for (const cb of this.callbacks) cb();
  }

  // ==================== 查询 ====================

  getTasks(): TaskInfo[] {
    return Array.from(this.tasks.values());
  }

  private taskFolderPath(task: TaskInfo): string {
    return path.join(task.mdDir, task.folderName);
  }

  // ==================== 提交 ====================

  async startTask(mdUri: vscode.Uri, prompt: string, images: string[]): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
    if (!apiKey) throw new Error('未配置 API Key');

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const mdBasename = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

    // 创建任务文件夹
    const now = new Date();
    const ts =
      String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
      String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

    const dir = mdDir;
    const prefix = `task-${ts}`;
    let seq = 0;
    if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
      for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) {
        if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
          const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10);
          if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
        }
      }
    }
    const folderName = `${prefix}-${seq}`;
    const folderPath = path.join(dir, folderName);
    fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });

    const concurrency = config.concurrency;
    const jobs: JobInfo[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      jobs.push({ id: '', status: 'submitting', progress: 0, imagePaths: [] });
    }

    const task: TaskInfo = {
      folderName,
      model: config.model,
      startTime: Date.now(),
      mdDir,
      mdBasename,
      jobs,
    };
    this.tasks.set(folderName, task);
    this.save();
    this.notify();

    // 后台并发提交
    await Promise.allSettled(
      jobs.map(async (_, i) => {
        try {
          const resp = await postGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
            model: config.model,
            prompt,
            images,
            aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
            imageSize: config.imageSize,
            replyType: 'async',
          });
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.id = resp.id;
            j.status = 'running';
            j.progress = resp.progress ?? 0;
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        } catch (err) {
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        }
      }),
    );

    // 全部提交失败：整任务作废
    const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
    if (cur && cur.jobs.every((j) => j.status !== 'running')) {
      this.tasks.delete(folderName);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
      this.save();
      this.notify();

      const errors = [...new Set(cur.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`全部提交失败：${errors.join('；')}`);
      return;
    }

    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  // ==================== 轮询 ====================

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) return;
    this.pollTimer = setInterval(() => void this.poll(), POLL_INTERVAL);
    void this.poll();
  }

  private stopTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.pollTimer);
      this.pollTimer = null;
    }
  }

  async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isPolling) return;
    this.isPolling = true;
    try {
      const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
      if (!apiKey) return;
      const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();

      const running: { folderName: string; jobIndex: number; jobId: string }[] = [];
      for (const [folderName, task] of this.tasks) {
        // 超时检查（使用会话时间起点防离线误判）
        const deadline = Math.max(task.startTime, this.sessionStart) + TASK_TIMEOUT;
        if (Date.now() > deadline) {
          let changed = false;
          for (const j of task.jobs) {
            if (j.status === 'running') {
              j.status = 'failed';
              j.error = '生成超时（10 分钟）';
              changed = true;
            }
          }
          if (changed) { this.save(); this.notify(); }
          continue;
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < task.jobs.length; i++) {
          const j = task.jobs[i];
          if (j.status === 'running' && j.id) {
            running.push({ folderName, jobIndex: i, jobId: j.id });
          }
        }
      }

      if (running.length === 0) {
        this.stopTimer();
        this.save();
        this.notify();
        return;
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        running.map((r) => getResult(config.baseUrl, apiKey, r.jobId)),
      );

      const changedTasks = new Set<string>();
      for (let k = 0; k < running.length; k++) {
        const { folderName, jobIndex, jobId } = running[k];
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;
        const job = task.jobs[jobIndex];
        if (!job || job.id !== jobId || job.status !== 'running') continue;

        const result = results[k];
        if (result.status === 'rejected') continue; // 瞬时错误，下轮重试

        const resp: GenerateResponse = result.value;
        switch (resp.status) {
          case 'succeeded':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = 'succeeded';
            job.progress = 100;
            if (resp.results) {
              const folderPath = this.taskFolderPath(task);
              let nextSeq = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.imagePaths.length, 0);
              for (const r of resp.results) {
                nextSeq++;
                try {
                  const fp = await downloadImage(r.url, folderPath, `${task.mdBasename}-${nextSeq}`);
                  job.imagePaths.push(fp);
                } catch { /* 单张下载失败跳过 */ }
              }
            }
            break;
          case 'failed':
          case 'violation':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = resp.status;
            job.error = resp.error || '未知错误';
            break;
          case 'running':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.progress = resp.progress ?? job.progress;
            break;
        }
      }

      // 清理已终结的任务
      const toRemove: string[] = [];
      for (const folderName of changedTasks) {
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;
        const allDone = task.jobs.every(
          (j) => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation',
        );
        if (!allDone) continue;

        toRemove.push(folderName);
        const totalImages = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.imagePaths.length, 0);

        if (totalImages === 0) {
          try { fs.rmdirSync(this.taskFolderPath(task)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${errors.join('；') || '未知错误'}`);
        } else if (task.jobs.some((j) => j.status !== 'succeeded')) {
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分生成失败（${totalImages} 张成图）：${errors.join('；')}`);
        }
      }

      for (const fn of toRemove) {
        this.tasks.delete(fn);
      }

      if (changedTasks.size > 0 || toRemove.length > 0) {
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      }

      if (!this.hasRunningJobs()) {
        this.stopTimer();
      }
    } finally {
      this.isPolling = false;
    }
  }

  private hasRunningJobs(): boolean {
    for (const task of this.tasks.values()) {
      if (task.jobs.some((j) => j.status === 'submitting' || j.status === 'running')) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  // ==================== 持久化 ====================

  private save(): void {
    const data = Array.from(this.tasks.values()).map((t) => ({
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      startTime: t.startTime,
      mdDir: t.mdDir,
      mdBasename: t.mdBasename,
      jobs: t.jobs.map((j) => ({
        id: j.id,
        status: j.status,
        progress: j.progress,
        imagePaths: j.imagePaths,
        error: j.error,
      })),
    }));
    this.context.globalState.update('activeTasks', data);
  }

  private load(): void {
    const data = this.context.globalState.get<TaskInfo[]>('activeTasks');
    if (!data || !Array.isArray(data)) return;

    for (const item of data) {
      this.tasks.set(item.folderName, {
        folderName: item.folderName,
        model: item.model || '',
        startTime: item.startTime || 0,
        mdDir: item.mdDir || '',
        mdBasename: item.mdBasename || '',
        jobs: (item.jobs || []).map((j: JobInfo) => ({
          id: j.id || '',
          status: j.status || 'failed',
          progress: j.progress ?? 0,
          imagePaths: j.imagePaths || [],
          error: j.error,
        })),
      });
    }
  }

  // ==================== 续拉 ====================

  resume(): void {
    this.sessionStart = Date.now();

    let changed = false;
    for (const [, task] of this.tasks) {
      for (const j of task.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'submitting' && !j.id) {
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.error = '提交未完成（扩展已重启）';
          changed = true;
        }
      }
    }
    if (changed) {
      this.save();
      this.notify();
    }

    if (this.hasRunningJobs()) {
      this.ensureTimer();
    }
  }
}

+  }

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { TaskManager } from './task-manager';
import type { FrontendMessage, BackendMessage } from './shared';

// ==================== 工具 ====================

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

function getTargetMdUri(uri?: vscode.Uri): vscode.Uri | undefined {
  if (uri && uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) return uri;
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (editor && editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) return editor.document.uri;
  return undefined;
}

// ==================== Sidebar ====================

class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly configManager: ConfigManager,
    private readonly taskManager: TaskManager,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this.view = webviewView;
    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        this.extensionUri,
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map((f) => f.uri) || []),
      ],
    };
    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);

    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => {
      void this.handleMessage(msg);
    });
  }

  private post(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this.view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async sendState(): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const currentMd = vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? path.basename(vscode.window.activeTextEditor.document.fileName)
      : undefined;

    this.post({
      type: 'stateSync',
      config,
      tasks: this.taskManager.getTasks(),
      history: [],
      libraries: [],
      currentMd,
    });
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this.sendState();
        break;

      case 'configUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === 'apiKey') {
          const val = msg.value as string;
          if (val) await this.configManager.setApiKey(val);
          const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
          this.post({ type: 'stateSync', config, tasks: [], history: [], libraries: [], currentMd: undefined });
        } else {
          const patch: Record<string, unknown> = {};
          patch[msg.key] = msg.value;
          await this.configManager.updateConfig(patch);
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'generate': {
        const mdUri = getTargetMdUri();
        if (!mdUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
        if (!apiKey) {
          const input = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
            title: 'Image Flow: 请设置 API Key',
            prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取地址: https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
            password: true,
            ignoreFocusOut: true,
            placeHolder: 'sk-...',
          });
          if (input) {
            await this.configManager.setApiKey(input);
          } else {
            vscode.window.showWarningMessage('未配置 API Key，已取消生成');
            return;
          }
        }
        await this.generateFromSidebar(mdUri);
        break;
      }

      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
        break;

      case 'openImage': {
        if (msg.fsPath.startsWith('http')) {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.fsPath));
        } else {
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.fsPath));
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'addLibrary':
      case 'removeLibrary':
      case 'insertImage':
        break;
    }
  }

  private async generateFromSidebar(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
      const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);
      await this.taskManager.startTask(mdUri, prompt, images.map((img) => img.dataUri));
    } catch (err) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
    }
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data: https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>Image Flow</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

// ==================== 命令入口 ====================

async function commandGenerate(configManager: ConfigManager, taskManager: TaskManager, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const mdUri = getTargetMdUri(uri);
  if (!mdUri) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键点击一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }
  const apiKey = await configManager.getApiKey();
  if (!apiKey) {
    const input = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
      title: 'Image Flow: 请设置 API Key',
      prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取地址: https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
      password: true,
      ignoreFocusOut: true,
      placeHolder: 'sk-...',
    });
    if (input) {
      await configManager.setApiKey(input);
    } else {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('未配置 API Key，已取消生成');
      return;
    }
  }

  try {
    const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
    const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);
    await taskManager.startTask(mdUri, prompt, images.map((img) => img.dataUri));
  } catch (err) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
  }
}

// ==================== 激活 ====================

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context);
  const taskManager = new TaskManager(configManager, context);

  // 侧栏
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager, taskManager);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // 任务变更时推送到侧栏
  context.subscriptions.push(
    taskManager.onStateChange(() => {
      sidebarProvider['post']({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks: taskManager.getTasks() });
    }),
  );

  // 命令
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', (uri?: vscode.Uri) =>
      commandGenerate(configManager, taskManager, uri),
    ),
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在后续版本实现');
    }),
  );

  // 重启续拉
  taskManager.resume();
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // subscriptions 自动清理
}

### 🤖 Assistant: *修复 SidebarProvider 中的私有方法访问——添加公开方法。*

`15:34:47`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Wait, there's a problem. The `onStateChange` callback uses `sidebarProvider['post']` which accesses a private method via bracket notation. This is a hack. Let me make a public method on SidebarProvider for this, or restructure the callback.
> 
> Actually, looking more carefully, the `post` method is private. I need to either:
> 1. Make it public (or add a public method for pushing task updates)

> Now let me also make sure the `resolveWebviewView` method in TaskManager's `resume` will send an initial taskUpdate when the webview connects after resume. Actually, looking at the flow:
> 
> 1. Extension activates → taskManager.resume() → ensures timer, sends notify → but the webview isn't connected yet
> 2. Webview connects → sends 'init' → SidebarProvider.handleMessage('init') → sendState() → includes tasks
> 
> So the init flow handles the initial task display. When the taskManager notifies changes (from resume's submitting→failed transition), there's no webview yet, so nothing is sent. That's fine because the next 'init' will include the updated tasks.
> 
> But wait - there's a subtle issue. When resume() calls this.notify() (because of submitting→failed changes), the callback tries to call sidebarProvider.pushTaskUpdate(), which calls this.view?.webview.postMessage(). At this point, this.view is still undefined (webview hasn't connected yet). The optional chaining handles this safely.
> 
> Let me check the compile.

## 🤷 Command `/opsx:apply`

`15:36:18`

**Args:** `按计划实施 M4（素材库）：手动素材库（递归扫描、上限保护）与按 MD 路径逐层自动生成的「当前路径」库；右键缩略图插入相对引用（含空格路径 <> 包裹及解析端兼容）。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。`

> Implement tasks from an OpenSpec change.
> 
> **Input**: Optionally specify a change name (e.g., `/opsx:apply add-auth`). If omitted, check if it can be inferred from conversation context. If vague or ambiguous you MUST prompt for available changes.
> 
> **Steps**
> 
> 1. **Select the change**
> 
>    If a name is provided, use it. Otherwise:
>    - Infer from conversation context if the user mentioned a change
>    - Auto-select if only one active change exists
>    - If ambiguous, run `openspec list --json` to get available changes and use the **AskUserQuestion tool** to let the user select
> 
>    Always announce: "Using change: <name>" and how to override (e.g., `/opsx:apply <other>`).
> 
> 2. **Check status to understand the schema**
>    ```bash
>    openspec status --change "<name>" --json
>    ```
>    Parse the JSON to understand:
>    - `schemaName`: The workflow being used (e.g., "spec-driven")
>    - `planningHome`, `changeRoot`, and `actionContext`: planning scope and edit constraints
>    - Which artifact contains the tasks (typically "tasks" for spec-driven, check status for others)
> 
> 3. **Get apply instructions**
> 
>    ```bash
>    openspec instructions apply --change "<name>" --json
>    ```
> 
>    This returns:
>    - `contextFiles`: artifact ID -> array of concrete file paths (varies by schema)
>    - Progress (total, complete, remaining)
>    - Task list with status
>    - Dynamic instruction based on current state
> 
>    **Handle states:**
>    - If `state: "blocked"` (missing artifacts): show message, suggest using `/opsx:continue`
>    - If `state: "all_done"`: congratulate, suggest archive
>    - Otherwise: proceed to implementation
> 
>    **Workspace guard:** If status JSON reports `actionContext.mode: "workspace-planning"` and `allowedEditRoots` is empty, explain that full workspace apply is not supported in this slice. Treat linked repos and folders as read-only context, ask the user to select an affected area through an explicit implementation workflow, and STOP before editing files.
> 
> 4. **Read context files**
> 
>    Read every file path listed under `contextFiles` from the apply instructions output.
>    The files depend on the schema being used:
>    - **spec-driven**: proposal, specs, design, tasks
>    - Other schemas: follow the contextFiles from CLI output
> 
> 5. **Show current progress**
> 
>    Display:
>    - Schema being used
>    - Progress: "N/M tasks complete"
>    - Remaining tasks overview
>    - Dynamic instruction from CLI
> 
> 6. **Implement tasks (loop until done or blocked)**
> 
>    For each pending task:
>    - Show which task is being worked on
>    - Make the code changes required
>    - Keep changes minimal and focused
>    - Mark task complete in the tasks file: `- [ ]` → `- [x]`
>    - Continue to next task
> 
>    **Pause if:**
>    - Task is unclear → ask for clarification
>    - Implementation reveals a design issue → suggest updating artifacts
>    - Error or blocker encountered → report and wait for guidance
>    - User interrupts
> 
> 7. **On completion or pause, show status**
> 
>    Display:
>    - Tasks completed this session
>    - Overall progress: "N/M tasks complete"
>    - If all done: suggest archive
>    - If paused: explain why and wait for guidance
> 
> **Output During Implementation**
> 
> ```
> ## Implementing: <change-name> (schema: <schema-name>)
> 
> Working on task 3/7: <task description>
> [...implementation happening...]
> ✓ Task complete
> 
> Working on task 4/7: <task description>
> [...implementation happening...]
> ✓ Task complete
> ```
> 
> **Output On Completion**
> 
> ```
> ## Implementation Complete
> 
> **Change:** <change-name>
> **Schema:** <schema-name>
> **Progress:** 7/7 tasks complete ✓
> 
> ### Completed This Session
> - [x] Task 1
> - [x] Task 2
> ...
> 
> All tasks complete! You can archive this change with `/opsx:archive`.
> ```
> 
> **Output On Pause (Issue Encountered)**
> 
> ```
> ## Implementation Paused
> 
> **Change:** <change-name>
> **Schema:** <schema-name>
> **Progress:** 4/7 tasks complete
> 
> ### Issue Encountered
> <description of the issue>
> 
> **Options:**
> 1. <option 1>
> 2. <option 2>
> 3. Other approach
> 
> What would you like to do?
> ```
> 
> **Guardrails**
> - Keep going through tasks until done or blocked
> - Always read context files before starting (from the apply instructions output)
> - If task is ambiguous, pause and ask before implementing
> - If implementation reveals issues, pause and suggest artifact updates
> - Keep code changes minimal and scoped to each task
> - Update task checkbox immediately after completing each task
> - Pause on errors, blockers, or unclear requirements - don't guess
> - Use contextFiles from CLI output, don't assume specific file names
> 
> **Fluid Workflow Integration**
> 
> This skill supports the "actions on a change" model:
> 
> - **Can be invoked anytime**: Before all artifacts are done (if tasks exist), after partial implementation, interleaved with other actions
> - **Allows artifact updates**: If implementation reveals design issues, suggest updating artifacts - not phase-locked, work fluidly
> 
> 
> ARGUMENTS: 按计划实施 M4（素材库）：手动素材库（递归扫描、上限保护）与按 MD 路径逐层自动生成的「当前路径」库；右键缩略图插入相对引用（含空格路径 <> 包裹及解析端兼容）。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。

#### 👀 Read `spec.md`

`15:36:23`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-openspec-260611231038/openspec/changes/m1-m8-milestones/specs/material-library/spec.md</code></summary>

```markdown
## ADDED Requirements

### Requirement: 手动素材库管理
系统 SHALL 支持用户手动添加/移除素材库文件夹，递归扫描图片。

#### Scenario: 添加素材库
- **WHEN** 用户点击「+ 添加」
- **THEN** 弹出系统文件夹选择器，用户选择目录后加入素材库列表（去重检查），列表存入 `workspaceState`

#### Scenario: 移除素材库
- **WHEN** 用户点击某素材库的移除按钮
- **THEN** 该库从列表移除，`workspaceState` 立即更新，`localResourceRoots` 重设

#### Scenario: 递归扫描
- **WHEN** 系统扫描手动素材库
- **THEN** 递归扫描目录内全部图片，深度上限 3 层、条目上限 500，超出截断

#### Scenario: 大目录保护
- **WHEN** 素材库目录包含超过 500 张图片或深度超过 3 层
- **THEN** 系统截断扫描结果，不卡死

### Requirement: 自动素材库（当前路径）
系统 SHALL 按生效 MD 路径自动生成分层素材库。

#### Scenario: 自动素材库生成
- **WHEN** 生效 MD 在工作区内
- **THEN** 从工作区根目录的下一层起，到 MD 所在目录为止，每一层各成一个库（不含工作区根那层），只取该层直接图片（不递归）

#### Scenario: 无图片的层级不显示
- **WHEN** 某层目录内无图片
- **THEN** 该层不在素材库区域显示

#### Scenario: MD 不在工作区
- **WHEN** 生效 MD 不在任何工作区内
- **THEN** 自动素材库为空

#### Scenario: 生效 MD 变化时刷新
- **WHEN** 生效 MD 变化
- **THEN** 重新扫描自动素材库；未变化不重扫

### Requirement: 素材库缩略图显示与交互
系统 SHALL 在素材库区域以网格显示缩略图，支持左键打开与右键插入。

#### Scenario: 缩略图网格布局
- **WHEN** 素材库区域有图片
- **THEN** 以网格显示缩略图，每行张数由 `workbenchCols` 配置控制

#### Scenario: 左键打开原图
- **WHEN** 用户左键点击缩略图
- **THEN** 用 VS Code 打开原始图片文件

#### Scenario: 右键插入 Markdown 引用
- **WHEN** 用户右键点击缩略图
- **THEN** 以相对路径 Markdown 引用格式插入生效 MD 的光标位置

### Requirement: 图片引用插入规则
系统 SHALL 在插入 Markdown 图片引用时遵循路径规范化规则。

#### Scenario: 仅生效 MD 当前活动时才插入
- **WHEN** 用户右键缩略图插入
- **THEN** 检查当前活动编辑器是否为生效 MD；是则插入，否则警告并忽略

#### Scenario: POSIX 相对路径
- **WHEN** 计算图片相对 MD 的路径
- **THEN** 使用 POSIX 风格分隔符，非 `..` 开头时加 `./` 前缀

#### Scenario: 特殊字符路径包裹
- **WHEN** 路径含空格或半角括号
- **THEN** 用 `<>` 包裹路径（如 `![alt](<path (1).png>)`），与 §5 解析端对应

#### Scenario: 跨盘符路径
- **WHEN** 图片与 MD 在不同盘符，无法计算相对路径
- **THEN** 警告用户并放弃插入

#### Scenario: alt 文本生成
- **WHEN** 生成 Markdown 引用语法
- **THEN** alt 文本取图片文件名（去扩展名）

```
</details>

### 🤖 Assistant: *## Implementing: m1-m8-milestones (schema…*

`15:36:59`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now I have a clear picture. Let me plan the M4 implementation:
> 
> ## M4 Tasks
> - 4.1: Create `src/materials.ts` — MaterialLibrary class
> - 4.2: Recursive scan with depth/entry limits — part of materials.ts
> - 4.3: Auto library per MD path — part of materials.ts
> - 4.4: Frontend material library components — update Workbench.tsx
> - 4.5: Right-click insert — extension.ts handles `insertImage` message + context menu in webview
> - 4.6: Verification
> 
> ## Architecture
> 
> ### src/materials.ts
> ```typescript
> class MaterialLibrary {
>   // Manual libraries
>   async addLibrary(): Promise<void>  // Show folder picker, add to list
>   async removeLibrary(path: string): Promise<void>  // Remove from list
>   getManualLibraries(): LibraryInfo[]  // Scan all manual libs
>   
>   // Auto libraries
>   getAutoLibraries(mdUri: vscode.Uri): LibraryInfo[]  // Per-MD path layers
>   
>   // Scanning
>   scanDirectory(dir: string, recursive: boolean): ImageRef[]
>   
>   // Path validation for insertion
>   static buildImageReference(imageFsPath: string, mdFsPath: string): string | null
> }
> ```
> 
> ### ImageRef
> For webview display, I need `webviewUri` which is an `asWebviewUri`-converted URI for the webview to display. The backend needs to convert fsPaths to webview URIs before sending to the frontend.
> 
> ### Flow for addLibrary:
> 1. Frontend sends `{ type: 'addLibrary' }` via postMessage
> 2. Backend: `vscode.window.showOpenDialog({ canSelectFolders: true })` 
> 3. User picks folder
> 4. Backend: Add to workspaceState list, update localResourceRoots
> 5. Backend: Scan to get images, send updated stateSync
> 
> ### Flow for insertImage:
> 1. User right-clicks thumbnail in webview
> 2. Frontend captures right-click, sends `{ type: 'insertImage', imagePath: '...' }` (fs path of the image)
> 3. Backend: Check active editor = effective MD
> 4. Backend: Compute POSIX relative path
> 5. Backend: Build `![alt](path)` with `<>` wrapping if needed
> 6. Backend: Insert at cursor position in active editor

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { ImageRef, LibraryInfo } from './shared';

const MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MAX_ENTRIES = 500;

export class MaterialLibrary {
  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private toWebviewUri: (fsPath: string) => vscode.Uri | undefined,
  ) {}

  // ======== 手动素材库 CRUD ========

  async addLibrary(): Promise<void> {
    const result = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
      canSelectFolders: true,
      canSelectFiles: false,
      canSelectMany: false,
      title: '选择素材库文件夹',
    });
    if (!result || result.length === 0) return;

    const folderPath = result[0].fsPath;
    const libs = this.configManager.getLibraries();
    if (libs.includes(folderPath)) return; // 去重

    libs.push(folderPath);
    await this.configManager.setLibraries(libs);
  }

  async removeLibrary(libPath: string): Promise<void> {
    const libs = this.configManager.getLibraries().filter((l) => l !== libPath);
    await this.configManager.setLibraries(libs);
  }

  // ======== 扫描引擎 ========

  /** 递归扫描（手动素材库用） */
  private scanRecursive(dir: string, maxDepth: number): ImageRef[] {
    const images: ImageRef[] = [];
    if (maxDepth <= 0 || images.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) return images;

    try {
      for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
        if (images.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
        const fp = path.join(dir, entry.name);

        if (entry.isDirectory()) {
          for (const img of this.scanRecursive(fp, maxDepth - 1)) {
            if (images.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
            images.push(img);
          }
        } else if (entry.isFile()) {
          const ext = path.extname(entry.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
          if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) {
            images.push({ fsPath: fp, webviewUri: this.toWebviewUri(fp)?.toString() ?? '', filename: entry.name });
          }
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // 权限错误静默跳过
    }
    return images.slice(0, MAX_ENTRIES);
  }

  /** 扫描单层目录（自动素材库用，不递归） */
  private scanSingleDir(dir: string): ImageRef[] {
    const images: ImageRef[] = [];
    try {
      for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
        if (!entry.isFile()) continue;
        const ext = path.extname(entry.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
        if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) {
          const fp = path.join(dir, entry.name);
          images.push({ fsPath: fp, webviewUri: this.toWebviewUri(fp)?.toString() ?? '', filename: entry.name });
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // 静默
    }
    return images;
  }

  // ======== 查询 ========

  getManualLibraries(): LibraryInfo[] {
    return this.configManager.getLibraries().map((libPath) => ({
      name: path.basename(libPath),
      path: libPath,
      images: this.scanRecursive(libPath, MAX_DEPTH),
    }));
  }

  getAutoLibraries(mdUri: vscode.Uri): LibraryInfo[] {
    const wsFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(mdUri);
    if (!wsFolder) return [];

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const wsRoot = wsFolder.uri.fsPath;

    // 从工作区根下一层起，到 MD 所在目录为止，逐层收集
    const layers: string[] = [];
    let cur = mdDir;
    while (cur !== wsRoot && cur !== path.dirname(cur)) {
      layers.unshift(cur);
      cur = path.dirname(cur);
    }

    return layers
      .map((dirPath) => {
        const images = this.scanSingleDir(dirPath);
        if (images.length === 0) return null;
        const rel = path.relative(wsRoot, dirPath) || '.';
        return { name: rel, path: dirPath, images };
      })
      .filter((l): l is LibraryInfo => l !== null);
  }

  getLibraryPaths(): string[] {
    return this.configManager.getLibraries();
  }

  // ======== 插入引用 ========

  /** 构造 Markdown 图片引用语法。返回 null 表示跨盘符无法引用。 */
  static buildImageReference(imageFsPath: string, mdFsPath: string): string | null {
    const imgRoot = path.parse(imageFsPath).root;
    const mdRoot = path.parse(mdFsPath).root;
    if (imgRoot !== mdRoot) return null; // 跨盘符

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdFsPath);
    const imgName = path.basename(imageFsPath, path.extname(imageFsPath));

    // 转为 POSIX 相对路径
    const rel = path.posix.relative(
      mdDir.split(path.sep).join('/'),
      imageFsPath.split(path.sep).join('/'),
    );

    const prefixed = rel.startsWith('..') ? rel : './' + rel;
    const needsWrap = /[\s()]/.test(prefixed);

    return needsWrap
      ? `![${imgName}](<${prefixed}>)`
      : `![${imgName}](${prefixed})`;
  }
}

```
</details>

>        - `poll()`: collects all running jobs, parallel GET results, processes succeeded (downloads images with sequential numbering), failed/violation (marks error), running (updates progress)
>        - `ensureTimer()`/`stopTimer()`: start/stop single 4s timer
>        - `resume()`: reset sessionStart, handle submitting-without-id → failed, restart polling
>        - Timeout: deadline = max(startTime, sessionStart) + 10min (offline time not counted)

All Tabs.Content elements have `forceMount: true` and `style: activeTab !== 'tabName' ? { display: 'none' } : undefined` to preserve state. Uses `acquireVsCodeApi<FrontendMessage>()` and a `window.addEventListener('message', handler)` pattern.
>    - **media/components/Workbench.tsx**: Four controls (model/resolution/ratio selects + concurrency stepper), generate row (MD name + preview + generate buttons), status line. Material area is still a placeholder: `<div className="materials-placeholder">素材库功能将在后续版本中实现</div>` — THIS NEEDS REPLACEMENT FOR M4.
>    - **media/components/Tasks.tsx**: TaskCard (expanded by default, progress bar, per-second timer, thumbnails, errors) + HistoryCard (collapsed by default, grouped by folder). HistoryCard uses `post` prop for openImage. Thumbnail grid uses `--tasks-cols` CSS variable.
>    - **media/components/Settings.tsx**: API key password input + external link, node select, cols steppers, model injection editor (model select + textarea).
>    - **media/sidebar.css**: Complete CSS for all components, using VS Code theme variables.
>    - **media/globals.d.ts**: `declare function acquireVsCodeApi<T>(): VsCodeApi<T>` with postMessage/getState/setState
> 
> 4. Errors and Fixes:
>    - **tsconfig.webview.json moduleResolution error**: `'--resolveJsonModule' cannot be specified when 'moduleResolution' is set to 'classic'`. Fix: added `"moduleResolution": "bundler"`.
>    - **tsconfig.webview.json rootDir conflict**: Webview components import `../../src/shared.ts` which is outside rootDir "media". Fix: removed rootDir and added `"src/shared.ts"` to include.
>    - **ESLint prefer-const**: `let apiKey` never reassigned. Fix: changed to `const`.
>    - **acquireVsCodeApi type mismatch**: Used `acquireVsCodeApi<BackendMessage>()` causing postMessage to expect BackendMessage instead of FrontendMessage. Fix: changed to `acquireVsCodeApi<FrontendMessage>()`.
>    - **ESLint unused vars warnings**: 4 warnings for unused variables (libraries in App.tsx, _ak/_pk in config.ts, ImageFlowConfig/TaskInfo/ImageRef/LibraryInfo imports in extension.ts). Fix: added `varsIgnorePattern: '^_'` to eslint config, removed unused type imports, prefixed libraries with `_`.
>    - **HistoryCard missing post prop**: HistoryCard used `post` function but didn't receive it as prop. Fix: added `post` to HistoryCard props interface and passed it from parent.
>    - **Tab state loss bug** (user reported): "切走再切回来，页内的局部状态（比如展开/收起、输入到一半的内容）会丢失、整页回到初始样子。这与 spec §8 的要求不符，请自查为什么你的验证没发现这一点，并在本轮一并修复。" Root cause: Radix Tabs.Content unmounts child React components when inactive. Fix: Added `forceMount: true` and `style: activeTab !== tabName ? { display: 'none' } : undefined` to each Tabs.Content in App.tsx.
>    - **SidebarProvider private method access**: `sidebarProvider['post'](...)` used bracket notation to access private method. Fix: added public `pushTaskUpdate()` method.
>

```typescript
import React, { useCallback } from 'react';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, FrontendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

interface WorkbenchProps {
  config: ImageFlowConfig;
  currentMd: string | undefined;
  statusMessage: string;
  post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void;
}

const MODELS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const IMAGE_SIZES = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const ASPECT_RATIOS = ['1:1', '3:4', '4:3', '16:9', '9:16'];

export default function Workbench({ config, currentMd, statusMessage, post }: WorkbenchProps) {
  const handleConfigUpdate = useCallback(
    (key: string, value: unknown) => {
      post({ type: 'configUpdate', key, value });
    },
    [post],
  );

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'workbench' },
    // 素材库区（M4 填充）
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'materials-area' },
      React.createElement('div', { className: 'section-header' }, '素材库'),
      React.createElement('div', { className: 'materials-placeholder' }, '素材库功能将在后续版本中实现'),
    ),
    // 底部停靠区
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'dock-area' },
      // 控件行
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'controls-row' },
        // 模型下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '模型',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.model,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('model', e.target.value),
            },
            MODELS.map((m) => React.createElement('option', { key: m, value: m }, m)),
          ),
        ),
        // 分辨率下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '分辨率',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.imageSize,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('imageSize', e.target.value),
            },
            IMAGE_SIZES.map((s) => React.createElement('option', { key: s, value: s }, s)),
          ),
        ),
        // 比例下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '比例',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.aspectRatio,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('aspectRatio', e.target.value),
            },
            ASPECT_RATIOS.map((r) => React.createElement('option', { key: r, value: r }, r)),
          ),
        ),
        // 并发数步进器
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '并发数',
          React.createElement('input', {
            type: 'number',
            className: 'control-number',
            min: 1,
            max: 10,
            value: config.concurrency,
            onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
              const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
              if (v >= 1 && v <= 10) handleConfigUpdate('concurrency', v);
            },
          }),
        ),
      ),
      // 生成行
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'generate-row' },
        React.createElement(
          'span',
          { className: 'current-md' },
          currentMd ? `📄 ${currentMd}` : '未打开 Markdown 文件',
        ),
        React.createElement(
          'button',
          {
            className: 'btn btn-secondary',
            onClick: () => post({ type: 'preview' }),
          },
          '预览请求',
        ),
        React.createElement(
          'button',
          {
            className: 'btn btn-primary',
            disabled: !currentMd,
            onClick: () => post({ type: 'generate' }),
          },
          currentMd ? '生成' : '未打开 Markdown 文件',
        ),
      ),
      // 状态行
      statusMessage &&
        React.createElement(
          'div',
          { className: `status-line ${statusMessage.startsWith('错误') || statusMessage.startsWith('生成出错') ? 'status-error' : ''}` },
          statusMessage,
        ),
    ),
  );
}

```
</details>

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-openspec-260611231038/media/sidebar.css</code></summary>

```css
/* ===== 基础 ===== */
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body { font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: var(--vscode-font-size); color: var(--vscode-foreground); background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background); padding: 0; }

/* ===== Tab 布局 ===== */
.app-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }
.tab-list { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); flex-shrink: 0; }
.tab-trigger { flex: 1; padding: 8px 0; border: none; background: none; color: var(--vscode-foreground); cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.tab-trigger[data-state="active"] { border-bottom-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); font-weight: 600; }
.tab-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px; }

/* ===== 通用控件 ===== */
.control-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.control-select, .control-number { width: 100%; padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }

/* ===== 工作台 ===== */
.workbench { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
.materials-area { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; }
.section-header { font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.materials-placeholder { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; padding: 16px 0; }
.dock-area { flex-shrink: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); padding-top: 8px; }
.controls-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.generate-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.current-md { flex: 1; font-size: 11px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.btn { padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-button-border); border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; }
.btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.btn-primary { background: var(--vscode-button-background); color: var(--vscode-button-foreground); }
.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground); }
.btn-secondary { background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground); color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); }
.btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground); }
.status-line { font-size: 11px; padding: 2px 0; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.status-error { color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); }

/* ===== 任务页 ===== */
.tasks-page { padding: 4px 0; }
.empty-state { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; padding: 16px 0; text-align: center; }
.task-card { border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
.task-card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 6px 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background); }
.task-card-header:hover { background: var(--vscode-list-hoverBackground); }
.task-card-title { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.task-card-toggle { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 8px; font-size: 10px; }
.task-card-body { padding: 6px 8px; }
.progress-bar { position: relative; height: 16px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--vscode-progressBar-background); transition: width 0.3s; }
.progress-text { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; }
.task-hint { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.task-error { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.task-thumb { width: calc((100% - 8px * (var(--tasks-cols, 2) - 1)) / var(--tasks-cols, 2)); height: auto; margin: 2px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); }
.task-thumb:hover { border-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); }

/* ===== 设置页 ===== */
.settings-page { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
.setting-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.setting-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.setting-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; }
.setting-input { flex: 1; padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }
.setting-select, .setting-number { padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }
.setting-textarea { padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; resize: vertical; font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); }
.setting-link { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground); white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; }
.setting-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.loading { padding: 16px; text-align: center; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }

```
</details>

> Since this is a webview, we can't do a native right-click context menu in VS Code. Instead, we should detect right-click on thumbnails and send an `insertImage` message to the backend, which will handle the insertion. The backend will check if the active editor matches the target MD and insert the reference.

> 
> For the `insertImage` handler in extension.ts:
> 1. Get the active text editor
> 2. Check it's a .md file
> 3. Call `MaterialLibrary.buildImageReference(imageFsPath, mdFsPath)`
> 4. If null → show cross-volume warning
> 5. Otherwise → insert at cursor position using editor.edit()

+    const libPaths = this.materialLibrary.getLibraryPaths().map((p) => vscode.Uri.file(p));
+    this.view.webview.options = {
+      enableScripts: true,
+      localResourceRoots: [
+        this.extensionUri,
+        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map((f) => f.uri) || []),
+        ...libPaths,
+      ],
+    };
+  }
