```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { postGenerate, getResult, isTransientError, type GenerateResponse } from './api';
import { validateImageExt, IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { TaskInfo, JobInfo, ImageRef } from './shared';

const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000;
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000;

type StateCallback = () => void;

async function downloadImage(url: string, folder: string, filename: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`下载失败: HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    ext = validateImageExt(ext);
    const fullPath = path.join(folder, `${filename}.${ext}`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, buf);
    return fullPath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

type TaskCompletedCallback = (folderName: string, imagePaths: string[]) => void;

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks = new Map<string, TaskInfo>();
  private pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private isPolling = false;
  private callbacks: StateCallback[] = [];
  private completedCallbacks: TaskCompletedCallback[] = [];
  private sessionStart = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    this.load();
  }

  // ==================== 回调 ====================

  onStateChange(cb: StateCallback): vscode.Disposable {
    this.callbacks.push(cb);
    return new vscode.Disposable(() => {
      const i = this.callbacks.indexOf(cb);
      if (i >= 0) this.callbacks.splice(i, 1);
    });
  }

  onTaskCompleted(cb: TaskCompletedCallback): vscode.Disposable {
    this.completedCallbacks.push(cb);
    return new vscode.Disposable(() => {
      const i = this.completedCallbacks.indexOf(cb);
      if (i >= 0) this.completedCallbacks.splice(i, 1);
    });
  }

  private notify(): void {
    for (const cb of this.callbacks) cb();
  }

  private notifyCompleted(folderName: string, imagePaths: string[]): void {
    for (const cb of this.completedCallbacks) cb(folderName, imagePaths);
  }

  /** 扫描 MD 所在目录下已完成的任务文件夹，返回所有成图（排除进行中任务文件夹） */
  getHistory(mdDir: string): ImageRef[] {
    const activeFolders = new Set(this.tasks.keys());
    const results: ImageRef[] = [];

    try {
      if (!fs.existsSync(mdDir)) return results;
      for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
        if (!entry.isDirectory() || !entry.name.startsWith('task-')) continue;
        if (activeFolders.has(entry.name)) continue;

        const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, entry.name);
        let hasImages = false;
        try {
          for (const file of fs.readdirSync(folderPath, { withFileTypes: true })) {
            if (!file.isFile()) continue;
            const ext = path.extname(file.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
            if (!IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) continue;
            hasImages = true;
            results.push({ fsPath: path.join(folderPath, file.name), webviewUri: '', filename: file.name });
          }
        } catch { /* 权限错误跳过 */ }

        // 无图片文件夹不列出（但不删除，防范并发下载）
        void hasImages;
      }
    } catch { /* 权限错误跳过 */ }

    // 按文件夹名倒序（新任务在前）
    results.sort((a, b) => {
      const fa = path.basename(path.dirname(a.fsPath));
      const fb = path.basename(path.dirname(b.fsPath));
      return fb.localeCompare(fa);
    });

    return results;
  }

  // ==================== 查询 ====================

  getTasks(): TaskInfo[] {
    return Array.from(this.tasks.values());
  }

  private taskFolderPath(task: TaskInfo): string {
    return path.join(task.mdDir, task.folderName);
  }

  // ==================== 提交 ====================

  async startTask(mdUri: vscode.Uri, prompt: string, images: string[]): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
    const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
    if (!apiKey) throw new Error('未配置 API Key');

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const mdBasename = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

    // 创建任务文件夹
    const now = new Date();
    const ts =
      String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2) +
      String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') +
      String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

    const dir = mdDir;
    const prefix = `task-${ts}`;
    let seq = 0;
    if (fs.existsSync(dir)) {
      for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) {
        if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
          const s = parseInt(name.slice(prefix.length + 1), 10);
          if (!isNaN(s) && s >= seq) seq = s + 1;
        }
      }
    }
    const folderName = `${prefix}-${seq}`;
    const folderPath = path.join(dir, folderName);
    fs.mkdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true });

    const concurrency = config.concurrency;
    const jobs: JobInfo[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      jobs.push({ id: '', status: 'submitting', progress: 0, imagePaths: [] });
    }

    const task: TaskInfo = {
      folderName,
      model: config.model,
      startTime: Date.now(),
      mdDir,
      mdBasename,
      jobs,
    };
    this.tasks.set(folderName, task);
    this.save();
    this.notify();

    // 后台并发提交
    await Promise.allSettled(
      jobs.map(async (_, i) => {
        try {
          const resp = await postGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
            model: config.model,
            prompt,
            images,
            aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
            imageSize: config.imageSize,
            replyType: 'async',
          });
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.id = resp.id;
            j.status = 'running';
            j.progress = resp.progress ?? 0;
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        } catch (err) {
          const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
          if (cur) {
            const j = cur.jobs[i];
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.save();
            this.notify();
          }
        }
      }),
    );

    // 全部提交失败：整任务作废
    const cur = this.tasks.get(folderName);
    if (cur && cur.jobs.every((j) => j.status !== 'running')) {
      this.tasks.delete(folderName);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
      this.save();
      this.notify();

      const errors = [...new Set(cur.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`全部提交失败：${errors.join('；')}`);
      return;
    }

    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  // ==================== 轮询 ====================

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) return;
    this.pollTimer = setInterval(() => void this.poll(), POLL_INTERVAL);
    void this.poll();
  }

  private stopTimer(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.pollTimer);
      this.pollTimer = null;
    }
  }

  async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isPolling) return;
    this.isPolling = true;
    try {
      const apiKey = await this.configManager.getApiKey();
      if (!apiKey) return;
      const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();

      const running: { folderName: string; jobIndex: number; jobId: string }[] = [];
      for (const [folderName, task] of this.tasks) {
        // 超时检查（使用会话时间起点防离线误判）
        const deadline = Math.max(task.startTime, this.sessionStart) + TASK_TIMEOUT;
        if (Date.now() > deadline) {
          let changed = false;
          for (const j of task.jobs) {
            if (j.status === 'running') {
              j.status = 'failed';
              j.error = '生成超时（10 分钟）';
              changed = true;
            }
          }
          if (changed) { this.save(); this.notify(); }
          continue;
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < task.jobs.length; i++) {
          const j = task.jobs[i];
          if (j.status === 'running' && j.id) {
            running.push({ folderName, jobIndex: i, jobId: j.id });
          }
        }
      }

      if (running.length === 0) {
        this.stopTimer();
        this.save();
        this.notify();
        return;
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        running.map((r) => getResult(config.baseUrl, apiKey, r.jobId)),
      );

      const changedTasks = new Set<string>();
      for (let k = 0; k < running.length; k++) {
        const { folderName, jobIndex, jobId } = running[k];
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;
        const job = task.jobs[jobIndex];
        if (!job || job.id !== jobId || job.status !== 'running') continue;

        const result = results[k];
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          // 瞬时错误（5xx/429/网络故障/超时）→ 保持 running，下轮重试
          if (isTransientError(result.reason)) continue;
          // 永久错误（4xx/格式异常）→ 判失败
          changedTasks.add(folderName);
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = result.reason instanceof Error ? result.reason.message : String(result.reason);
          continue;
        }

        const resp: GenerateResponse = result.value;
        switch (resp.status) {
          case 'succeeded':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = 'succeeded';
            job.progress = 100;
            if (resp.results) {
              const folderPath = this.taskFolderPath(task);
              let nextSeq = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.imagePaths.length, 0);
              for (const r of resp.results) {
                nextSeq++;
                try {
                  const fp = await downloadImage(r.url, folderPath, `${task.mdBasename}-${nextSeq}`);
                  job.imagePaths.push(fp);
                } catch { /* 单张下载失败跳过 */ }
              }
            }
            break;
          case 'failed':
          case 'violation':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.status = resp.status;
            job.error = resp.error || '未知错误';
            break;
          case 'running':
            changedTasks.add(folderName);
            job.progress = resp.progress ?? job.progress;
            break;
        }
      }

      // 清理已终结的任务
      const toRemove: string[] = [];
      for (const folderName of changedTasks) {
        const task = this.tasks.get(folderName);
        if (!task) continue;
        const allDone = task.jobs.every(
          (j) => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation',
        );
        if (!allDone) continue;

        toRemove.push(folderName);
        const totalImages = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.imagePaths.length, 0);
        const allImagePaths = task.jobs.flatMap((j) => j.imagePaths);

        if (totalImages === 0) {
          try { fs.rmdirSync(this.taskFolderPath(task)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${errors.join('；') || '未知错误'}`);
        } else if (task.jobs.some((j) => j.status !== 'succeeded')) {
          const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分生成失败（${totalImages} 张成图）：${errors.join('；')}`);
        } else {
          // 全部成功：先通知完成（平滑过渡），再移除卡片
          this.notifyCompleted(folderName, allImagePaths);
        }
      }

      for (const fn of toRemove) {
        this.tasks.delete(fn);
      }

      if (changedTasks.size > 0 || toRemove.length > 0) {
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      }

      if (!this.hasRunningJobs()) {
        this.stopTimer();
      }
    } finally {
      this.isPolling = false;
    }
  }

  private hasRunningJobs(): boolean {
    for (const task of this.tasks.values()) {
      if (task.jobs.some((j) => j.status === 'submitting' || j.status === 'running')) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  // ==================== 持久化 ====================

  private save(): void {
    const data = Array.from(this.tasks.values()).map((t) => ({
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      startTime: t.startTime,
      mdDir: t.mdDir,
      mdBasename: t.mdBasename,
      jobs: t.jobs.map((j) => ({
        id: j.id,
        status: j.status,
        progress: j.progress,
        imagePaths: j.imagePaths,
        error: j.error,
      })),
    }));
    this.context.globalState.update('activeTasks', data);
  }

  private load(): void {
    const data = this.context.globalState.get<TaskInfo[]>('activeTasks');
    if (!data || !Array.isArray(data)) return;

    for (const item of data) {
      this.tasks.set(item.folderName, {
        folderName: item.folderName,
        model: item.model || '',
        startTime: item.startTime || 0,
        mdDir: item.mdDir || '',
        mdBasename: item.mdBasename || '',
        jobs: (item.jobs || []).map((j: JobInfo) => ({
          id: j.id || '',
          status: j.status || 'failed',
          progress: j.progress ?? 0,
          imagePaths: j.imagePaths || [],
          error: j.error,
        })),
      });
    }
  }

  // ==================== 续拉 ====================

  resume(): void {
    this.sessionStart = Date.now();

    let changed = false;
    for (const [, task] of this.tasks) {
      for (const j of task.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'submitting' && !j.id) {
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.error = '提交未完成（扩展已重启）';
          changed = true;
        }
      }
    }
    if (changed) {
      this.save();
      this.notify();
    }

    if (this.hasRunningJobs()) {
      this.ensureTimer();
    }
  }
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { CONFIG_DEFAULTS, type ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';

export class ConfigManager {
  constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  // ========== API Key（secrets 加密存储） ==========

  async getApiKey(): Promise<string | undefined> {
    return this.context.secrets.get('apiKey');
  }

  async setApiKey(key: string): Promise<void> {
    await this.context.secrets.store('apiKey', key);
  }

  // ========== 通用配置（globalState，patch 合并） ==========

  getConfig(): ImageFlowConfig {
    const stored = this.context.globalState.get<Partial<ImageFlowConfig>>('config') || {};
    return { ...CONFIG_DEFAULTS, ...stored, apiKey: '' };
  }

  async updateConfig(patch: Partial<ImageFlowConfig>): Promise<ImageFlowConfig> {
    const current = this.getConfig();
    // 从 patch 中剥离 apiKey（不进 globalState）
    const { apiKey: _apiKey, ...patchWithoutKey } = patch;
    void _apiKey;
    const { apiKey: _currentApiKey, ...currentWithoutKey } = current;
    void _currentApiKey;
    const merged = { ...currentWithoutKey, ...patchWithoutKey };
    await this.context.globalState.update('config', merged);
    return { ...merged, apiKey: '' };
  }

  // ========== 素材库列表（workspaceState，按工作区隔离） ==========

  getLibraries(): string[] {
    return this.context.workspaceState.get<string[]>('libraries') || [];
  }

  async setLibraries(libs: string[]): Promise<void> {
    await this.context.workspaceState.update('libraries', libs);
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './utils';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import type { ImageRef, LibraryInfo } from './shared';

const MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MAX_ENTRIES = 500;

export class MaterialLibrary {
  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private toWebviewUri: (fsPath: string) => vscode.Uri | undefined,
  ) {}

  // ======== 手动素材库 CRUD ========

  async addLibrary(): Promise<void> {
    const result = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
      canSelectFolders: true,
      canSelectFiles: false,
      canSelectMany: false,
      title: '选择素材库文件夹',
    });
    if (!result || result.length === 0) return;

    const folderPath = result[0].fsPath;
    const libs = this.configManager.getLibraries();
    if (libs.includes(folderPath)) return; // 去重

    libs.push(folderPath);
    await this.configManager.setLibraries(libs);
  }

  async removeLibrary(libPath: string): Promise<void> {
    const libs = this.configManager.getLibraries().filter((l) => l !== libPath);
    await this.configManager.setLibraries(libs);
  }

  // ======== 扫描引擎 ========

  /** 递归扫描（手动素材库用） */
  private scanRecursive(dir: string, maxDepth: number): ImageRef[] {
    const images: ImageRef[] = [];
    if (maxDepth <= 0 || images.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) return images;

    try {
      for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
        if (images.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
        const fp = path.join(dir, entry.name);

        if (entry.isDirectory()) {
          for (const img of this.scanRecursive(fp, maxDepth - 1)) {
            if (images.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
            images.push(img);
          }
        } else if (entry.isFile()) {
          const ext = path.extname(entry.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
          if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) {
            images.push({ fsPath: fp, webviewUri: this.toWebviewUri(fp)?.toString() ?? '', filename: entry.name });
          }
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // 权限错误静默跳过
    }
    return images.slice(0, MAX_ENTRIES);
  }

  /** 扫描单层目录（自动素材库用，不递归） */
  private scanSingleDir(dir: string): ImageRef[] {
    const images: ImageRef[] = [];
    try {
      for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
        if (!entry.isFile()) continue;
        const ext = path.extname(entry.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
        if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) {
          const fp = path.join(dir, entry.name);
          images.push({ fsPath: fp, webviewUri: this.toWebviewUri(fp)?.toString() ?? '', filename: entry.name });
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // 静默
    }
    return images;
  }

  // ======== 查询 ========

  getManualLibraries(): LibraryInfo[] {
    return this.configManager.getLibraries().map((libPath) => ({
      name: path.basename(libPath),
      path: libPath,
      images: this.scanRecursive(libPath, MAX_DEPTH),
    }));
  }

  getAutoLibraries(mdUri: vscode.Uri): LibraryInfo[] {
    const wsFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(mdUri);
    if (!wsFolder) return [];

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const wsRoot = wsFolder.uri.fsPath;

    // 从工作区根下一层起，到 MD 所在目录为止，逐层收集
    const layers: string[] = [];
    let cur = mdDir;
    while (cur !== wsRoot && cur !== path.dirname(cur)) {
      layers.unshift(cur);
      cur = path.dirname(cur);
    }

    return layers
      .map((dirPath) => {
        const images = this.scanSingleDir(dirPath);
        if (images.length === 0) return null;
        const rel = path.relative(wsRoot, dirPath) || '.';
        return { name: rel, path: dirPath, images };
      })
      .filter((l): l is LibraryInfo => l !== null);
  }

  getLibraryPaths(): string[] {
    return this.configManager.getLibraries();
  }

  // ======== 插入引用 ========

  /** 构造 Markdown 图片引用语法。返回 null 表示跨盘符无法引用。 */
  static buildImageReference(imageFsPath: string, mdFsPath: string): string | null {
    const imgRoot = path.parse(imageFsPath).root;
    const mdRoot = path.parse(mdFsPath).root;
    if (imgRoot !== mdRoot) return null; // 跨盘符

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdFsPath);
    const imgName = path.basename(imageFsPath, path.extname(imageFsPath));

    // 转为 POSIX 相对路径
    const rel = path.posix.relative(
      mdDir.split(path.sep).join('/'),
      imageFsPath.split(path.sep).join('/'),
    );

    const prefixed = rel.startsWith('..') ? rel : './' + rel;
    const needsWrap = /[\s()]/.test(prefixed);

    return needsWrap
      ? `![${imgName}](<${prefixed}>)`
      : `![${imgName}](${prefixed})`;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';
import { assemblePrompt, readImagesMd } from './prompt';
import type { ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';

/** 预览文档四段标题 */
const HEADERS = [
  '最终提示词',
  '请求地址',
  '请求参数',
  '参考图概览',
] as const;

/** 生成预览文档内容，与真实提交共用请求体构造，不调 API */
export async function buildPreview(
  config: ImageFlowConfig,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<string> {
  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);

  // 组装最终 prompt（与真实提交一致）
  const imagesMd = await readImagesMd(mdUri);
  const finalPrompt = assemblePrompt(config.modelInjections[config.model], imagesMd, prompt);

  // 构造请求体（与真实提交完全一致）
  const reqBody = buildRequestBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt: finalPrompt,
    images: images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
    replyType: 'async',
  });

  // 1. 最终提示词
  const section1 = finalPrompt;

  // 2. 请求地址
  const section2 = `POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;

  // 3. 请求参数 JSON（剔除 prompt 和 images）
  const { prompt: _, images: __, ...paramsSlim } = reqBody;
  const section3 = JSON.stringify(paramsSlim, null, 2);

  // 4. 参考图概览
  let section4: string;
  if (images.length === 0) {
    section4 = '（无参考图）';
  } else {
    section4 = images
      .map((img) => {
        const prefix = img.dataUri.slice(0, 48);
        return `image${img.index}: ${prefix}…（总长度 ${img.dataUri.length}）`;
      })
      .join('\n');
  }

  return [
    `===== ${HEADERS[0]} =====\n\n${section1}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[1]} =====\n\n${section2}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[2]}（已剔除 prompt 与 images）=====\n\n${section3}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[3]} =====\n\n${section4}`,
  ].join('\n\n\n');
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';

/** 读取工作区根目录的 IMAGES.md，不存在或为空返回 undefined */
export async function readImagesMd(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<string | undefined> {
  const wsFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(mdUri);
  if (!wsFolder) return undefined;
  const imagesPath = path.join(wsFolder.uri.fsPath, 'IMAGES.md');
  try {
    const buf = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(vscode.Uri.file(imagesPath));
    const text = Buffer.from(buf).toString('utf-8').trim();
    return text || undefined;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

/** 组装最终 prompt：「模型注入句」+「IMAGES.md」+「替换后正文」空行连接，空段省略 */
export function assemblePrompt(
  modelInjection: string | undefined,
  imagesMd: string | undefined,
  parsedPrompt: string,
): string {
  const parts = [modelInjection, imagesMd, parsedPrompt].filter(Boolean);
  return parts.join('\n\n');
}
```

```typescript
// ==================== 配置类型 ====================

export interface ImageFlowConfig {
  apiKey: string; // 仅前端绑定用，stateSync 中始终为空串
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' | 'https://grsaiapi.com';
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number; // 1~10
  workbenchCols: number; // 1~8
  tasksCols: number; // 1~8
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const CONFIG_DEFAULTS: Omit<ImageFlowConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ==================== 任务类型（M2 初版，M3 起补充完整状态机） ====================

export interface JobInfo {
  id: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  progress: number;
  imagePaths: string[];
  error?: string;
}

export interface TaskInfo {
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  startTime: number;
  mdDir: string;
  mdBasename: string;
  jobs: JobInfo[];
}

// ==================== 参考图/素材 ====================

export interface ImageRef {
  fsPath: string;
  webviewUri: string;
  filename: string;
}

export interface LibraryInfo {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  images: ImageRef[];
}

// ==================== 消息协议 ====================

/** 前端 → 后端 */
export type FrontendMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'addLibrary' }
  | { type: 'removeLibrary'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; fsPath: string };

// ==================== 纯函数（前后端共用） ====================

/** 计算任务聚合进度百分比：每个 job 1/N 权重，终结记满分，running 取远端进度，submitting 记 0 */
export function calcProgress(jobs: JobInfo[]): number {
  if (jobs.length === 0) return 0;
  const share = 100 / jobs.length;
  let total = 0;
  for (const j of jobs) {
    if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') {
      total += share;
    } else {
      total += (share * j.progress) / 100;
    }
  }
  return Math.round(total);
}

/** 后端 → 前端 */
export type BackendMessage =
  | { type: 'stateSync'; config: ImageFlowConfig; tasks: TaskInfo[]; history: ImageRef[]; libraries: LibraryInfo[]; currentMd?: string }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskInfo[]; history: ImageRef[] }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; message: string };

```
</details>

```typescript
/** 图片扩展名白名单，供素材库扫描、历史扫描、下载校验共用 */
export const IMAGE_EXTENSIONS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'];

/** 根据文件扩展名推断 MIME 类型 */
export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml',
  };
  return mimeMap[ext.toLowerCase()] || 'image/png';
}

/** gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表：比例 + 分辨率 → 宽x高 */
const VIP_PIXEL_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': '1024x1024',  '2K': '2048x2048', '4K': '4096x4096' },
  '3:4':  { '1K': '864x1152',   '2K': '1728x2304', '4K': '3456x4608' },
  '4:3':  { '1K': '1152x864',   '2K': '2304x1728', '4K': '4608x3456' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1344x768',   '2K': '2688x1536', '4K': '3840x2160' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '768x1344',   '2K': '1536x2688', '4K': '2160x3840' },
};

/** 获取 gpt-image-2-vip 的像素值字符串 */
export function vipPixelValue(aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): string {
  const ratioEntry = VIP_PIXEL_TABLE[aspectRatio];
  if (!ratioEntry) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的比例: ${aspectRatio}`);
  }
  const pixel = ratioEntry[imageSize];
  if (!pixel) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的分辨率: ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return pixel;
}

/** 校验图片扩展名是否在白名单内，不在则回退 png */
export function validateImageExt(ext: string): string {
  const normalized = ext.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
  return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(normalized) ? normalized : 'png';
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { mimeFromExt } from './utils';

/** 解析出的参考图信息 */
export interface ReferenceImage {
  index: number;
  path: string;
  dataUri: string;
}

/** 解析结果 */
export interface ParseResult {
  prompt: string;
  images: ReferenceImage[];
}

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 中的图片语法，提取参考图并替换为编号占位符。
 * 支持普通路径和尖括号包裹路径（含空格与半角括号）。
 */
export async function parseMarkdown(content: string, mdDir: string): Promise<ParseResult> {
  const trimmed = content.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }

  // 匹配 ![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path>)
  // 分组: 1=alt, 2=尖括号内路径, 3=普通路径
  const regex = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((?:<([^>]+)>|([^)]+))\)/g;

  // 第一遍：找出所有唯一路径并分配编号
  const pathToIndex = new Map<string, number>();
  const matches: { fullMatch: string; alt: string; imgPath: string }[] = [];
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;

  while ((match = regex.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
    const imgPath = (match[2] || match[3]).trim();
    if (!pathToIndex.has(imgPath)) {
      pathToIndex.set(imgPath, pathToIndex.size + 1);
    }
    matches.push({ fullMatch: match[0], alt: match[1], imgPath });
  }

  // 第二遍：读取参考图文件，全部成功再继续
  const images: ReferenceImage[] = [];
  const failedPaths: string[] = [];

  for (const [imgPath, index] of pathToIndex.entries()) {
    try {
      const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, imgPath);
      const buf = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(vscode.Uri.file(absPath));
      const ext = path.extname(imgPath).slice(1).toLowerCase();
      const mime = mimeFromExt(ext);
      const b64 = Buffer.from(buf).toString('base64');
      images.push({ index, path: imgPath, dataUri: `data:${mime};base64,${b64}` });
    } catch {
      failedPaths.push(imgPath);
    }
  }

  if (failedPaths.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败:\n${failedPaths.join('\n')}`);
  }

  // 第三遍：替换正文中的图片语法为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
  let prompt = trimmed;
  for (const { fullMatch, imgPath } of matches) {
    const index = pathToIndex.get(imgPath)!;
    const basename = path.basename(imgPath, path.extname(imgPath));
    prompt = prompt.replace(fullMatch, `[image${index}](${basename})`);
  }

  return { prompt, images };
}

```

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import Workbench from './Workbench';
import Tasks from './Tasks';
import Settings from './Settings';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, TaskInfo, ImageRef, LibraryInfo, FrontendMessage, BackendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

const vscode = acquireVsCodeApi<FrontendMessage>();

export default function App() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ImageFlowConfig | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskInfo[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ImageRef[]>([]);
  const [libraries, setLibraries] = useState<LibraryInfo[]>([]);
  const [currentMd, setCurrentMd] = useState<string | undefined>();
  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState('');

  // 处理来自扩展的消息
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (ev: MessageEvent<BackendMessage>) => {
      const msg = ev.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'stateSync':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          setLibraries(msg.libraries);
          setCurrentMd(msg.currentMd);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusMessage(msg.message);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatusMessage(msg.message);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);

    // 挂载后请求初始状态
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' } satisfies FrontendMessage);

    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const post = useCallback((msg: FrontendMessage) => {
    vscode.postMessage(msg);
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return React.createElement('div', { className: 'loading' }, '加载中...');
  }

  return React.createElement(
    Tabs.Root,
    { value: activeTab, onValueChange: setActiveTab, className: 'app-container' },
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.List,
      { className: 'tab-list' },
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '工作台'),
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'tasks', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '任务'),
      React.createElement(Tabs.Trigger, { value: 'settings', className: 'tab-trigger' }, '设置'),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'workbench', className: 'tab-content', forceMount: true, style: activeTab !== 'workbench' ? { display: 'none' } : undefined },
      React.createElement(Workbench, { config, currentMd, statusMessage, libraries, tasks, post }),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'tasks', className: 'tab-content', forceMount: true, style: activeTab !== 'tasks' ? { display: 'none' } : undefined },
      React.createElement(Tasks, { tasks, history, config, post }),
    ),
    React.createElement(
      Tabs.Content,
      { value: 'settings', className: 'tab-content', forceMount: true, style: activeTab !== 'settings' ? { display: 'none' } : undefined },
      React.createElement(Settings, { config, post }),
    ),
  );
}
```

```typescript
import React, { useCallback } from 'react';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, LibraryInfo, TaskInfo, FrontendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

interface WorkbenchProps {
  config: ImageFlowConfig;
  currentMd: string | undefined;
  statusMessage: string;
  libraries: LibraryInfo[];
  tasks: TaskInfo[];
  post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void;
}

const MODELS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const IMAGE_SIZES = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const ASPECT_RATIOS = ['1:1', '3:4', '4:3', '16:9', '9:16'];

export default function Workbench({ config, currentMd, statusMessage, libraries, tasks, post }: WorkbenchProps) {
  const handleConfigUpdate = useCallback(
    (key: string, value: unknown) => {
      post({ type: 'configUpdate', key, value });
    },
    [post],
  );

  const isGenerating = tasks.some((t) =>
    t.jobs.some((j) => j.status === 'submitting' || j.status === 'running'),
  );

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'workbench' },
    // 素材库区
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'materials-area' },
      libraries.length === 0
        ? React.createElement('div', { className: 'materials-empty' }, '暂无素材库。请在设置中添加手动素材库，或打开 Markdown 文件以显示自动素材库。')
        : libraries.map((lib) =>
            React.createElement(
              'div',
              { key: lib.path, className: 'library-group' },
              React.createElement('div', { className: 'library-name' }, lib.name),
              lib.images.length === 0
                ? React.createElement('div', { className: 'library-empty' }, '（空）')
                : React.createElement(
                    'div',
                    { className: 'library-grid', style: { '--workbench-cols': config.workbenchCols } as React.CSSProperties },
                    lib.images.map((img) =>
                      React.createElement('img', {
                        key: img.fsPath,
                        className: 'library-thumb',
                        src: img.webviewUri,
                        title: img.filename,
                        onClick: () => post({ type: 'openImage', fsPath: img.fsPath }),
                        onContextMenu: (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
                          e.preventDefault();
                          post({ type: 'insertImage', imagePath: img.fsPath });
                        },
                      }),
                    ),
                  ),
            ),
          ),
    ),
    // 底部停靠区
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'dock-area' },
      // 控件行
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'controls-row' },
        // 模型下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '模型',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.model,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('model', e.target.value),
            },
            MODELS.map((m) => React.createElement('option', { key: m, value: m }, m)),
          ),
        ),
        // 分辨率下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '分辨率',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.imageSize,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('imageSize', e.target.value),
            },
            IMAGE_SIZES.map((s) => React.createElement('option', { key: s, value: s }, s)),
          ),
        ),
        // 比例下拉
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '比例',
          React.createElement(
            'select',
            {
              className: 'control-select',
              value: config.aspectRatio,
              onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('aspectRatio', e.target.value),
            },
            ASPECT_RATIOS.map((r) => React.createElement('option', { key: r, value: r }, r)),
          ),
        ),
        // 并发数步进器
        React.createElement(
          'label',
          { className: 'control-label' },
          '并发数',
          React.createElement('input', {
            type: 'number',
            className: 'control-number',
            min: 1,
            max: 10,
            value: config.concurrency,
            onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
              const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
              if (v >= 1 && v <= 10) handleConfigUpdate('concurrency', v);
            },
          }),
        ),
      ),
      // 生成行
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'generate-row' },
        React.createElement(
          'span',
          { className: 'current-md' },
          currentMd ? `📄 ${currentMd}` : '未打开 Markdown 文件',
        ),
        React.createElement(
          'button',
          {
            className: 'btn btn-secondary',
            onClick: () => post({ type: 'preview' }),
          },
          '预览请求',
        ),
        React.createElement(
          'button',
          {
            className: 'btn btn-primary',
            disabled: !currentMd || isGenerating,
            onClick: () => post({ type: 'generate' }),
          },
          isGenerating ? '生成中…' : currentMd ? '生成' : '未打开 Markdown 文件',
        ),
      ),
      // 状态行
      statusMessage &&
        React.createElement(
          'div',
          { className: `status-line ${statusMessage.startsWith('错误') || statusMessage.startsWith('生成出错') ? 'status-error' : ''}` },
          statusMessage,
        ),
    ),
  );
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import React, { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
import type { ImageFlowConfig, FrontendMessage } from '../../src/shared';

interface SettingsProps {
  config: ImageFlowConfig;
  post: (msg: FrontendMessage) => void;
}

const MODELS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];

export default function Settings({ config, post }: SettingsProps) {
  const [apiKeyInput, setApiKeyInput] = useState(config.apiKey);
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);

  const handleConfigUpdate = useCallback(
    (key: string, value: unknown) => {
      post({ type: 'configUpdate', key, value });
    },
    [post],
  );

  const injectionText = config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || '';

  return React.createElement(
    'div',
    { className: 'settings-page' },
    // API Key
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, 'API Key'),
      React.createElement(
        'div',
        { className: 'setting-row' },
        React.createElement('input', {
          type: 'password',
          className: 'setting-input',
          value: apiKeyInput,
          placeholder: 'sk-...',
          onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
            const v = e.target.value;
            setApiKeyInput(v);
            handleConfigUpdate('apiKey', v);
          },
        }),
        React.createElement(
          'a',
          {
            className: 'setting-link',
            href: '#',
            onClick: (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
              e.preventDefault();
              post({ type: 'openImage', fsPath: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' });
            },
          },
          '获取 API Key →',
        ),
      ),
    ),
    // 节点选择
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '节点'),
      React.createElement(
        'select',
        {
          className: 'setting-select',
          value: config.baseUrl,
          onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => handleConfigUpdate('baseUrl', e.target.value),
        },
        React.createElement('option', { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' }, '国内节点'),
        React.createElement('option', { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com' }, '全球节点'),
      ),
    ),
    // 工作台每行张数
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '工作台每行缩略图数'),
      React.createElement('input', {
        type: 'number',
        className: 'setting-number',
        min: 1,
        max: 8,
        value: config.workbenchCols,
        onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
          const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
          if (v >= 1 && v <= 8) handleConfigUpdate('workbenchCols', v);
        },
      }),
    ),
    // 任务栏每行张数
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '任务栏每行缩略图数'),
      React.createElement('input', {
        type: 'number',
        className: 'setting-number',
        min: 1,
        max: 8,
        value: config.tasksCols,
        onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
          const v = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
          if (v >= 1 && v <= 8) handleConfigUpdate('tasksCols', v);
        },
      }),
    ),
    // 模型注入提示词编辑
    React.createElement(
      'div',
      { className: 'setting-group' },
      React.createElement('label', { className: 'setting-label' }, '模型注入提示词'),
      React.createElement(
        'select',
        {
          className: 'setting-select',
          value: injectionModel,
          onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLSelectElement>) => setInjectionModel(e.target.value),
        },
        MODELS.map((m) => React.createElement('option', { key: m, value: m }, m)),
      ),
      React.createElement('textarea', {
        className: 'setting-textarea',
        rows: 4,
        value: injectionText,
        placeholder: '输入该模型的注入提示词…',
        onChange: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
          const next = { ...config.modelInjections, [injectionModel]: e.target.value };
          handleConfigUpdate('modelInjections', next);
        },
      }),
    ),
  );
}

```

```css
/* ===== 基础 ===== */
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body { font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: var(--vscode-font-size); color: var(--vscode-foreground); background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background); padding: 0; }

/* ===== Tab 布局 ===== */
.app-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }
.tab-list { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); flex-shrink: 0; }
.tab-trigger { flex: 1; padding: 8px 0; border: none; background: none; color: var(--vscode-foreground); cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.tab-trigger[data-state="active"] { border-bottom-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); font-weight: 600; }
.tab-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px; }

/* ===== 通用控件 ===== */
.control-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.control-select, .control-number { width: 100%; padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }

/* ===== 工作台 ===== */
.workbench { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
.materials-area { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; }
.materials-empty { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; padding: 16px 0; }
.library-group { margin-bottom: 12px; }
.library-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.library-empty { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); padding: 4px 0; }
.library-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--workbench-cols, 4), 1fr); gap: 4px; }
.library-thumb { width: 100%; height: auto; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); object-fit: cover; aspect-ratio: 1; }
.library-thumb:hover { border-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); }
.section-header { font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.dock-area { flex-shrink: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); padding-top: 8px; }
.controls-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.generate-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.current-md { flex: 1; font-size: 11px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.btn { padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-button-border); border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; }
.btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.btn-primary { background: var(--vscode-button-background); color: var(--vscode-button-foreground); }
.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground); }
.btn-secondary { background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground); color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); }
.btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground); }
.status-line { font-size: 11px; padding: 2px 0; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.status-error { color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); }

/* ===== 任务页 ===== */
.tasks-page { padding: 4px 0; }
.empty-state { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; padding: 16px 0; text-align: center; }
.task-card { border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
.task-card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 6px 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background); }
.task-card-header:hover { background: var(--vscode-list-hoverBackground); }
.task-card-title { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.task-card-toggle { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 8px; font-size: 10px; }
.task-card-body { padding: 6px 8px; }
.progress-bar { position: relative; height: 16px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--vscode-progressBar-background); transition: width 0.3s; }
.progress-text { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; }
.task-hint { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.task-error { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.task-thumb { width: calc((100% - 8px * (var(--tasks-cols, 2) - 1)) / var(--tasks-cols, 2)); height: auto; margin: 2px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBar-border); }
.task-thumb:hover { border-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); }

/* ===== 设置页 ===== */
.settings-page { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
.setting-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.setting-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.setting-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; }
.setting-input { flex: 1; padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }
.setting-select, .setting-number { padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; }
.setting-textarea { padding: 4px 6px; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12px; resize: vertical; font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); }
.setting-link { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground); white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; }
.setting-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.loading { padding: 16px; text-align: center; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }

```
</details>

> ⚠️ **P1**: Spec §8.1 says "样式可放开 unsafe-inline 以兼容 Radix 内联定位" — the CSP has `style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'` which is correct.

Actually looking more carefully, `sendState` at line 96-98 already checks "非 MD 不清空" correctly, but it calls `sendState` on every editor change even if the MD file hasn't changed (e.g., tabbing between same file). The `setEffectiveMd` only updates the URI. But it doesn't check if the URI is the same as before to avoid unnecessary re-scanning.
> 
> Actually, looking at the `onDidChangeActiveTextEditor` handler (line 375-380):

>     if (editor && editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
>         sidebarProvider.setEffectiveMd(editor.document.uri);
>         await sidebarProvider.sendState();
>     }
> }),
> ```
> 
> This fires every time the active editor changes, even if the MD file is the same. There's no guard against unnecessary re-scanning. But this is more of a P2 performance issue than a functional bug.
>

> - ✅ Materials area on top
> - ✅ Dock area with controls: model, resolution, ratio, concurrency

> - ✅ Hints for submitting/running
> - ⚠️ **P2**: History cards use a single `expanded` state variable (line 91), meaning all history groups expand/collapse together. The spec doesn't explicitly say each card is independent, but it's weird UX-wise. Actually each HistoryCard is rendered separately in the map (line 169), so each has its own state. This is fine.
> 
> Let me re-read the history card... Actually each `HistoryCard` is rendered separately via `React.createElement(HistoryCard, ...)`, so each has its own `useState(false)` for `expanded`. That's correct.

> - ⚠️ **P2**: Spec says "已进行时长每秒自增" - the TaskCard has a `setInterval` that ticks every second. But when the component unmounts (task completes), the interval is cleaned up via the useEffect return. Good.
>

Since React.createElement is used, it creates a new component each render. But the key (folderName) stays the same, so it should maintain identity. Actually, with `React.createElement(TaskCard, { key: item.folderName, ... })`, React will reuse the component instance when the key matches. So the interval should persist correctly.
> 
> But wait — when the task transitions from active to completed, the card is removed from the `tasks` array and added to history. So the TaskCard unmounts and a HistoryCard mounts. That's the expected "smooth transition" behavior (spec §7.6/§8.4).

>     cur = path.dirname(cur);
> }
> ```
> This collects from MD dir up to workspace root (exclusive). But it includes the MD directory itself. Spec says "除工作区根那层" — so the workspace root is excluded, which is correct. But I notice that on Windows, path comparison with `!==` might be case-sensitive for paths that differ only in drive letter case. This is a minor edge case.
>

> - ✅ POSIX relative path
> - ✅ `./` prefix for non-`..` paths
> - ✅ `<>` wrapping for paths with spaces/parentheses

> 
> Actually wait, let me re-check. The `insertImage` handler (extension.ts line 203-218):
> ```typescript
> case 'insertImage': {
>     const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
>     if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {

>         return;
>     }
>     ...
> }
> ```
> 
> It checks `editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')` but does NOT verify it's the same as `this.effectiveMdUri`. This means if the user has two MD files open, right-clicking a material in the workbench will insert into whichever MD is the active editor, not necessarily the one shown as "生效 MD". This is a deviation from the spec.

> 
> ### Additional Issues Found:
> 
> #### P1: CSP missing font-src
> The CSP at line 261: `default-src 'none'; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data: https:;`
> The CSP doesn't include a `font-src` directive. If Radix or React uses web fonts, they'd be blocked. This is actually likely fine since VS Code themes use system fonts. But to be safe we should add `font-src ${webview.cspSource}`.
> 
> Actually, looking at the CSS, `body { font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); }` — this uses VS Code's CSS variable, no external fonts. So this is probably fine.
> 
> #### P1: `void hasImages` in task-manager.ts, line 98
> This is a dead statement that should be removed. The variable `hasImages` is set but never used effectively (it's a local variable used to track whether to skip the folder, but `void hasImages` is meaningless). Actually looking at the code:
> ```typescript
> if (!IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) continue;
> hasImages = true;
> results.push(...);
> ```
> So `hasImages` is set to true when an image is found. But there's no check after the loop to skip folders without images — the images are already pushed to `results`. The `void hasImages` on line 98 is just suppressing a TypeScript unused variable warning. The logic seems wrong — the intent is to exclude folders without images from the results, but since only images are pushed to results (not folders), this happens implicitly. The `void hasImages` is a hack.
> 
> Let me re-read the code more carefully:
> ```typescript
> for (const file of fs.readdirSync(folderPath, { withFileTypes: true })) {
>     if (!file.isFile()) continue;
>     const ext = path.extname(file.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
>     if (!IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) continue;
>     hasImages = true;
>     results.push({ fsPath: path.join(folderPath, file.name), ... });
> }
> ```
> And then `void hasImages;` — the result is still correct because only image files get pushed to results. The `hasImages` variable and `void` are noise. This is P3 (code quality, no functional impact).
> 
> Actually wait — the intent of "无图片的文件夹不列出" is that entire folders without images should not appear in the results. Since only image files are pushed individually to the results array (not grouped by folder), the `hasImages` check doesn't matter. Each image is independently added. So removing `hasImages` and `void hasImages` is safe.
> 
> #### P2: Spec §7.1 item 6 "提交成功后侧栏自动切到「任务」标签页"
> This is not implemented. After generate completes from the sidebar, the tab should switch to "tasks". Looking at `generateFromSidebar` (extension.ts line 233), after `startTask()`, there's no message sent to switch tabs. The `startTask` method doesn't trigger this.
> 
> But this is specified as "提交成功后" — after successful submission, not after task completion. The side panel should switch to the tasks tab to show the new task card.
> 
> Actually, this would require adding a message type for tab switching or including it in the response. Since the backend doesn't have a way to trigger tab switching currently, we'd need to add a new message type or include it in the taskUpdate.
> 
> Actually, a simpler approach: after `generateFromSidebar` calls `startTask`, it could post a message to switch tabs. But `generateFromSidebar` is in the SidebarProvider which has access to `post`. Let me think about whether this is really needed...
> 
> The spec says: "提交成功后侧栏自动切到「任务」标签页。" This is an explicit requirement. Currently it's not implemented.
> 
> #### P2: Image count mismatch in body text
> Looking at the submit flow — `generateFromSidebar` passes `images.map((img) => img.dataUri)` to `startTask`, which passes them to `postGenerate`. But `images` from `parseMarkdown` are `ReferenceImage[]` with `dataUri` property. The data URIs go to the API correctly.
> 
> But what confuses me: In the submit flow, `images` are the base64-encoded reference images. They're added to the request body as the `images` field. Then in `postGenerate`, `buildRequestBody` includes them as `req.images`. This looks correct.
> 
> Actually wait — looking at the generate command flow more carefully:
> 
> 1. `parseMarkdown(content, mdDir)` → `{ prompt, images }` where `prompt` already has image references replaced
> 2. `assemblePrompt(injection, imagesMd, prompt)` → final prompt
> 3. `startTask(mdUri, finalPrompt, images.map(img => img.dataUri))` → submits with final prompt + base64 images
> 
> This looks correct. The prompt has `[imageN](filename)` placeholders, and the images array has N base64 data URIs. The API maps them by position.
> 
> #### P3: `url` parsing in downloadImage may throw
> In `downloadImage` (task-manager.ts line 21): `let ext = path.extname(new URL(url).pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();` — if the url is an invalid URL (not starting with http:// or https://), `new URL(url)` throws. This would be caught by the try/catch in the poll loop (line 315 `catch { /* 单张下载失败跳过 */ }`), but the error message is lost. This is minor since the API should return valid URLs.
> 
> ### Summary of Findings:
> 
> **P1 (High) — Should Fix:**
> 1. **`insertImage` doesn't verify active editor == effective MD** (spec §10.3): In `extension.ts` line 204, the check is `editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')` but should also verify it's the effective MD.
> 2. **configUpdate for apiKey wipes other state** (spec §8.1): In `extension.ts` line 133, when updating apiKey, sends empty tasks/history/libraries/currentMd.
> 3. **Missing tab switch after generate** (spec §7.1 item 6): After starting a generation task, the UI doesn't auto-switch to the tasks tab.
> 
> **P2 (Medium) — Should Fix:**
> 4. **Missing parser tests** (spec §12): No unit tests for `parseMarkdown` function (image syntax parsing, angle bracket paths, dedup, replacement).
> 5. **Missing preview assembly tests** (spec §12): No unit tests for `buildPreview` text assembly.
> 
> **P3 (Low) — Not Worth Fixing Now:**
> 6. **`hasImages` dead variable** in `getHistory` (task-manager.ts line 98): `void hasImages` is a hack to suppress unused variable warning.
> 7. **No guard against same-MD re-scanning** in `onDidChangeActiveTextEditor`: Performance, not functional.
> 8. **Case-sensitive path comparison on Windows** in `getAutoLibraries`.
> 
> Let me now fix the P1 items and the P2 test gaps.
</details>

> | 2 | `extension.ts:133` | §8.1: 单字段即时保存 | `apiKey` 变更时发送的 `stateSync` 把 tasks/history/libraries/currentMd 全置空 |

> ### P2 中优先级（2 项）
> | # | 位置 | spec 要求 | 实际行为 |
> |---|------|----------|---------|

> | 5 | `src/test/unit.test.ts` | §12: 预览文本组装的单元测试 | `buildPreview` 无任何测试 |

> ### P3 低优先级（3 项）

> | 7 | `extension.ts:374-380` | MD 跟随切换时未检查 URI 是否真的变化就重扫 |
> | 8 | `materials.ts:109` | Windows 盘符大小写不一致时路径比较可能失败 |
> 
> 现在修复 P1 和 P2。

```diff
        }
```

```typescript
          eb.insert(editor.selection.active, ref);
        });
        break;
      }
```

```typescript
    }

  private async generateFromSidebar(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
      const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
      const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);
      const imagesMd = await readImagesMd(mdUri);
      const finalPrompt = assemblePrompt(config.modelInjections[config.model], imagesMd, prompt);
      await this.taskManager.startTask(mdUri, finalPrompt, images.map((img) => img.dataUri));
    } catch (err) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
    }
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
```

#### ✏️  Edit `parser.ts`

`16:07:58`

```diff
@@ -1,3 +1,45 @@+/** 图片语法匹配正则：![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path>)，分组 1=alt, 2=尖括号内路径, 3=普通路径 */
+const IMAGE_REF_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((?:<([^>]+)>|([^)]+))\)/g;
+
+/** 解析出的图片引用（纯数据，不含 base64） */
+export interface ParsedImageRef {
+  index: number;
+  path: string;
+  fullMatch: string;
+}
+
+/** 从 Markdown 文本中提取图片引用并替换为编号占位符（纯函数，不含文件 I/O） */
+export function parseImageRefs(content: string): { prompt: string; refs: ParsedImageRef[] } {
+  const trimmed = content.trim();
+
+  const pathToIndex = new Map<string, number>();
+  const matches: { fullMatch: string; imgPath: string }[] = [];
+  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
+
+  while ((match = IMAGE_REF_RE.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
+    const imgPath = (match[2] || match[3]).trim();
+    if (!pathToIndex.has(imgPath)) {
+      pathToIndex.set(imgPath, pathToIndex.size + 1);
+    }
+    matches.push({ fullMatch: match[0], imgPath });
+  }
+
+  const refs: ParsedImageRef[] = [];
+  for (const [imgPath, index] of pathToIndex.entries()) {
+    refs.push({ index, path: imgPath, fullMatch: matches.find((m) => m.imgPath === imgPath)!.fullMatch });
+  }
+
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';
import { assemblePrompt, readImagesMd } from './prompt';
import type { ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';

/** 预览文档四段标题 */
const HEADERS = [
  '最终提示词',
  '请求地址',
  '请求参数',
  '参考图概览',
] as const;

/** 将预览四段内容组装为完整预览文本（纯函数，供测试复用） */
export function formatPreviewText(
  finalPrompt: string,
  baseUrl: string,
  paramsSlim: Record<string, unknown>,
  imageOverviews: string[],
): string {
  const section1 = finalPrompt;
  const section2 = `POST ${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;
  const section3 = JSON.stringify(paramsSlim, null, 2);
  const section4 = imageOverviews.length === 0 ? '（无参考图）' : imageOverviews.join('\n');

  return [
    `===== ${HEADERS[0]} =====\n\n${section1}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[1]} =====\n\n${section2}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[2]}（已剔除 prompt 与 images）=====\n\n${section3}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[3]} =====\n\n${section4}`,
  ].join('\n\n\n');
}

/** 生成预览文档内容，与真实提交共用请求体构造，不调 API */
export async function buildPreview(
  config: ImageFlowConfig,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<string> {
  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);

  // 组装最终 prompt（与真实提交一致）
  const imagesMd = await readImagesMd(mdUri);
  const finalPrompt = assemblePrompt(config.modelInjections[config.model], imagesMd, prompt);

  // 构造请求体（与真实提交完全一致）
  const reqBody = buildRequestBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt: finalPrompt,
    images: images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
    replyType: 'async',
  });

  // 1. 最终提示词
  const section1 = finalPrompt;

  // 2. 请求地址
  const section2 = `POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;

  // 3. 请求参数 JSON（剔除 prompt 和 images）
  const { prompt: _, images: __, ...paramsSlim } = reqBody;

  // 4. 参考图概览
  const imageOverviews = images.length === 0
    ? []
    : images.map((img) => `image${img.index}: ${img.dataUri.slice(0, 48)}…（总长度 ${img.dataUri.length}）`);
    void section1; void section2;

  return formatPreviewText(finalPrompt, config.baseUrl, paramsSlim, imageOverviews);
}

```
</details>

```diff
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].index, 1);

+    assert.strictEqual(refs[1].index, 2);
+    assert.ok(prompt.includes('[image1](foo)'));
+    assert.ok(prompt.includes('[image2](bar)'));
+  });
+
+  test('尖括号路径：含空格与括号', () => {
+    const content = '![x](<my pic (1).png>)';
+    const { prompt, refs } = parseImageRefs(content);
+    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 1);
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].path, 'my pic (1).png');
+    assert.ok(prompt.includes('[image1](my pic (1))'));
+  });
+
+  test('重复引用复用同一编号', () => {
+    const content = '![a](a.png) and ![b](a.png) and ![c](b.png)';
+    const { refs } = parseImageRefs(content);
+    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 2); // 两张唯一图片
+    const a = refs.find((r) => r.path === 'a.png');
+    const b = refs.find((r) => r.path === 'b.png');
+    assert.ok(a);
+    assert.ok(b);
+    // a.png 先出现，编号应为 1；b.png 后出现，编号应为 2
+    assert.strictEqual(a!.index, 1);
+    assert.strictEqual(b!.index, 2);
+  });
+
+  test('编号按首次出现顺序分配', () => {
+    const content = '![z](z.png) ![a](a.png) ![z](z.png) ![b](b.png)';
+    const { refs } = parseImageRefs(content);
+    // 首次出现顺序：z → a → b
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].path, 'z.png');
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].index, 1);
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[1].path, 'a.png');
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[1].index, 2);
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[2].path, 'b.png');
+    assert.strictEqual(refs[2].index, 3);
+  });
+
+  test('空内容抛出错误', () => {
+    // parseImageRefs 不抛错（纯函数），由 parseMarkdown 检查空内容
+    const { prompt, refs } = parseImageRefs('');
+    assert.strictEqual(prompt, '');
+    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 0);
+  });
+
+  test('无图片返回原 prompt', () => {
+    const content = 'just some markdown text';
+    const { prompt, refs } = parseImageRefs(content);
+    assert.strictEqual(prompt, content);
+    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 0);
+  });
+});
+
+suite('formatPreviewText — 预览文本组装', () => {
+  test('四段内容完整组装', () => {
+    const text = formatPreviewText(
+      'hello world',
+      'https://example.com',
+      { model: 'gpt-image-2', replyType: 'async' },
+      ['image1: data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAAN…（总长度 12345）'],
+    );
+    assert.ok(text.includes('===== 最终提示词 ====='));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('hello world'));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('===== 请求地址 ====='));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('POST https://example.com/v1/api/generate'));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('===== 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images）====='));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('"model"'));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('"gpt-image-2"'));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('===== 参考图概览 ====='));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('image1: data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAAN…（总长度 12345）'));
+  });
+
+  test('剔除 prompt 和 images：参数 JSON 不含这两个字段', () => {
+    const text = formatPreviewText(
+      'prompt text',
+      'https://x.com',
+      { model: 'nano-banana-2', aspectRatio: '1:1', replyType: 'async' },
+      [],
+    );
+    const paramsSection = text.split('===== 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images）=====')[1] || '';
+    const parsed = JSON.parse(paramsSection.trim());
+    assert.strictEqual(parsed.model, 'nano-banana-2');
+    assert.strictEqual('prompt' in parsed, false);
+    assert.strictEqual('images' in parsed, false);
+  });
+
+  test('无参考图时显示提示', () => {
+    const text = formatPreviewText(
+      '',
+      'https://x.com',
+      { model: 'x' },
+      [],
+    );
+    assert.ok(text.includes('（无参考图）'));
+  });
+
+  test('多参考图每张一行', () => {
+    const overviews = [
+      'image1: data:image/png;base64,aa…（总长度 100）',
+      'image2: data:image/jpeg;base64,bb…（总长度 200）',
+    ];
+    const text = formatPreviewText('', 'https://x.com', { model: 'x' }, overviews);
+    assert.ok(text.includes(overviews[0]));
+    assert.ok(text.includes(overviews[1]));
+    assert.ok(text.includes('\n'));
+  });
+});
```

```typescript
    }

  private async generateFromSidebar(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const config = await this.configManager.getConfig();
      const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
      const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);
      const imagesMd = await readImagesMd(mdUri);
      const finalPrompt = assemblePrompt(config.modelInjections[config.model], imagesMd, prompt);
      await this.taskManager.startTask(mdUri, finalPrompt, images.map((img) => img.dataUri));
      // 提交成功后自动切到任务标签页
      const tasks = this.taskManager.getTasks();
      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const history: ImageRef[] = this.taskManager.getHistory(mdDir).map((img) => ({
        ...img,
        webviewUri: this.view?.webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(img.fsPath))?.toString() ?? '',
      }));
      this.post({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks, history, switchTab: 'tasks' });
    } catch (err) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成出错：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
    }
  }
```

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';

/** 图片语法匹配正则：![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path>)，分组 1=alt, 2=尖括号内路径, 3=普通路径 */
const IMAGE_REF_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((?:<([^>]+)>|([^)]+))\)/g;

/** 解析出的图片引用（纯数据，不含 base64） */
export interface ParsedImageRef {
  index: number;
  path: string;
  fullMatch: string;
}

/** 从 Markdown 文本中提取图片引用并替换为编号占位符（纯函数，不含文件 I/O） */
export function parseImageRefs(content: string): { prompt: string; refs: ParsedImageRef[] } {
  const trimmed = content.trim();

  const pathToIndex = new Map<string, number>();
  const matches: { fullMatch: string; imgPath: string }[] = [];
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;

  while ((match = IMAGE_REF_RE.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
    const imgPath = (match[2] || match[3]).trim();
    if (!pathToIndex.has(imgPath)) {
      pathToIndex.set(imgPath, pathToIndex.size + 1);
    }
    matches.push({ fullMatch: match[0], imgPath });
  }

  const refs: ParsedImageRef[] = [];
  for (const [imgPath, index] of pathToIndex.entries()) {
    refs.push({ index, path: imgPath, fullMatch: matches.find((m) => m.imgPath === imgPath)!.fullMatch });
  }

  // 替换正文中的图片语法为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
  let prompt = trimmed;
  for (const { fullMatch, imgPath } of matches) {
    const index = pathToIndex.get(imgPath)!;
    const basename = path.basename(imgPath, path.extname(imgPath));
    prompt = prompt.replace(fullMatch, `[image${index}](${basename})`);
  }

  return { prompt, refs };
}

```

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { mimeFromExt } from './utils';

/** 解析出的参考图信息 */
export interface ReferenceImage {
  index: number;
  path: string;
  dataUri: string;
}

/** 解析结果 */
export interface ParseResult {
  prompt: string;
  images: ReferenceImage[];
}

/** 图片语法匹配正则：![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path>)，分组 1=alt, 2=尖括号内路径, 3=普通路径 */
const IMAGE_REF_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((?:<([^>]+)>|([^)]+))\)/g;

/** 解析出的图片引用（纯数据，不含 base64） */
export interface ParsedImageRef {
  index: number;
  path: string;
  fullMatch: string;
}

/** 从 Markdown 文本中提取图片引用并替换为编号占位符（纯函数，不含文件 I/O） */
export function parseImageRefs(content: string): { prompt: string; refs: ParsedImageRef[] } {
  const trimmed = content.trim();

  const pathToIndex = new Map<string, number>();
  const matches: { fullMatch: string; imgPath: string }[] = [];
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;

  while ((match = IMAGE_REF_RE.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
    const imgPath = (match[2] || match[3]).trim();
    if (!pathToIndex.has(imgPath)) {
      pathToIndex.set(imgPath, pathToIndex.size + 1);
    }
    matches.push({ fullMatch: match[0], imgPath });
  }

  const refs: ParsedImageRef[] = [];
  for (const [imgPath, index] of pathToIndex.entries()) {
    refs.push({ index, path: imgPath, fullMatch: matches.find((m) => m.imgPath === imgPath)!.fullMatch });
  }

  // 替换正文中的图片语法为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
  let prompt = trimmed;
  for (const { fullMatch, imgPath } of matches) {
    const index = pathToIndex.get(imgPath)!;
    const basename = path.basename(imgPath, path.extname(imgPath));
    prompt = prompt.replace(fullMatch, `[image${index}](${basename})`);
  }

  return { prompt, refs };
}

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 中的图片语法，提取参考图并替换为编号占位符。
 * 支持普通路径和尖括号包裹路径（含空格与半角括号）。
 */
export async function parseMarkdown(content: string, mdDir: string): Promise<ParseResult> {
  const trimmed = content.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }

  const { prompt: replacedPrompt, refs } = parseImageRefs(trimmed);

  // 读取参考图文件，全部成功再继续
  const images: ReferenceImage[] = [];
  const failedPaths: string[] = [];

  for (const ref of refs) {
    try {
      const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.path);
      const buf = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(vscode.Uri.file(absPath));
      const ext = path.extname(ref.path).slice(1).toLowerCase();
      const mime = mimeFromExt(ext);
      const b64 = Buffer.from(buf).toString('base64');
      images.push({ index: ref.index, path: ref.path, dataUri: `data:${mime};base64,${b64}` });
    } catch {
      failedPaths.push(ref.path);
    }
  }

  if (failedPaths.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败:\n${failedPaths.join('\n')}`);
  }

  return { prompt: replacedPrompt, images };
}
```

```typescript
/** 预览文档四段标题 */
const HEADERS = [
  '最终提示词',
  '请求地址',
  '请求参数',
  '参考图概览',
] as const;

/** 将预览四段内容组装为完整预览文本（纯函数，供测试复用） */
export function formatPreviewText(
  finalPrompt: string,
  baseUrl: string,
  paramsSlim: Record<string, unknown>,
  imageOverviews: string[],
): string {
  const section1 = finalPrompt;
  const section2 = `POST ${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;
  const section3 = JSON.stringify(paramsSlim, null, 2);
  const section4 = imageOverviews.length === 0 ? '（无参考图）' : imageOverviews.join('\n');

  return [
    `===== ${HEADERS[0]} =====\n\n${section1}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[1]} =====\n\n${section2}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[2]}（已剔除 prompt 与 images）=====\n\n${section3}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[3]} =====\n\n${section4}`,
  ].join('\n\n\n');
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { parseMarkdown } from './parser';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';
import { assemblePrompt, readImagesMd } from './prompt';
import type { ImageFlowConfig } from './shared';

/** 预览文档四段标题 */
const HEADERS = [
  '最终提示词',
  '请求地址',
  '请求参数',
  '参考图概览',
] as const;

/** 将预览四段内容组装为完整预览文本（纯函数，供测试复用） */
export function formatPreviewText(
  finalPrompt: string,
  baseUrl: string,
  paramsSlim: Record<string, unknown>,
  imageOverviews: string[],
): string {
  const section1 = finalPrompt;
  const section2 = `POST ${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;
  const section3 = JSON.stringify(paramsSlim, null, 2);
  const section4 = imageOverviews.length === 0 ? '（无参考图）' : imageOverviews.join('\n');

  return [
    `===== ${HEADERS[0]} =====\n\n${section1}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[1]} =====\n\n${section2}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[2]}（已剔除 prompt 与 images）=====\n\n${section3}`,
    `===== ${HEADERS[3]} =====\n\n${section4}`,
  ].join('\n\n\n');
}

/** 生成预览文档内容，与真实提交共用请求体构造，不调 API */
export async function buildPreview(
  config: ImageFlowConfig,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<string> {
  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { prompt, images } = await parseMarkdown(content, mdDir);

  // 组装最终 prompt（与真实提交一致）
  const imagesMd = await readImagesMd(mdUri);
  const finalPrompt = assemblePrompt(config.modelInjections[config.model], imagesMd, prompt);

  // 构造请求体（与真实提交完全一致）
  const reqBody = buildRequestBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt: finalPrompt,
    images: images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
    replyType: 'async',
  });

  // 请求参数 JSON（剔除 prompt 和 images）
  const { prompt: _, images: __, ...paramsSlim } = reqBody;

  // 参考图概览
  const imageOverviews = images.length === 0
    ? []
    : images.map((img) => `image${img.index}: ${img.dataUri.slice(0, 48)}…（总长度 ${img.dataUri.length}）`);

  return formatPreviewText(finalPrompt, config.baseUrl, paramsSlim, imageOverviews);
}

```
</details>

### 💭 Thinking: *Hmm, the section splitting approach is fragile…*

`16:10:52`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Hmm, the section splitting approach is fragile. Let me look at the actual format more carefully. The format is:
> 
> ```
> ===== 最终提示词 =====
> 
> prompt text
> 
> 
> ===== 请求地址 =====
> 
> POST https://x.com/v1/api/generate
> 
> 
> ===== 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images）=====
> 
> {"model":"nano-banana-2","aspectRatio":"1:1","replyType":"async"}
> 
> 
> ===== 参考图概览 =====
> 
> （无参考图）
> ```
> 
> So splitting by `=====` gives alternating headers and content sections. Let me think about this more carefully.
>

```typescript
        if (activeFolders.has(entry.name)) continue;

        const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, entry.name);
        let hasImages = false;
        try {
          for (const file of fs.readdirSync(folderPath, { withFileTypes: true })) {
            if (!file.isFile()) continue;
            const ext = path.extname(file.name).slice(1).toLowerCase();
            if (!IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) continue;
            hasImages = true;
            results.push({ fsPath: path.join(folderPath, file.name), webviewUri: '', filename: file.name });
          }
        } catch { /* 权限错误跳过 */ }

        // 无图片文件夹不列出（但不删除，防范并发下载）
        void hasImages;
      }
    } catch { /* 权限错误跳过 */ }

    // 按文件夹名倒序（新任务在前）
```
